<div class="content-entry"><article class="hascomments" data-page="bundle:jamf-pro-documentation-11.25.0/enus/Computer_Configuration_Profiles.html" id="bundle:jamf-pro-documentation-11.25.0/enus/Computer_Configuration_Profiles.html"><main role="main"><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title1" class="dita" role="article"><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title1" class="nested0" id="ID-00022bba"><h1 class="title topictitle1" id="ariaid-title1">Computer Configuration Profiles</h1><div class="body conbody"><p class="p">Configuration profiles are XML files (<span class="ph filepath">.mobileconfig</span>) that provide an easy way to define settings and restrictions for devices, computers, and users.</p><p class="p">You can use <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> to create a configuration profile or you can upload a configuration profile that was created using third-party software.</p><p class="p">When you create a computer configuration profile, you must specify the level at which to apply the profile—computer-level or user-level. Each level has a unique set of payloads and a few that are common to both. User-level profiles may not apply until the MDM-enabled user logs out of the computer and logs back in, or when the computer is restarted.</p><p class="p">There are two different ways to distribute a configuration profile: install it automatically (requires no interaction from the user) or make it available in Self Service.</p></div><nav role="navigation"></nav><nav class="related-links" role="navigation"><div class="linklist"><strong>In This Guide:</strong><ul class="linklist"><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="Computer_Management_Information.html#ID-0001de54">Computer Management Information</a></li><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="items_Available_to_Users_in_Jamf_Self_Service_for_macOS.html">Items Available to Users in Jamf Self Service for macOS</a></li></ul></div><div class="linklist"><strong>Jamf Resources:</strong><ul class="linklist"><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Deploying_Custom_Computer_Configuration_Profiles_Using_the_Application_and_Custom_Settings_Payload.html" target="_blank">Deploying Custom Computer Configuration Profiles Using the Application and Custom Settings Payload</a></li></ul></div></nav><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title2" class="topic concept nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="ID-00022bcb"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title2"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#ID-00022bcb__d268e134" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Payload Variables for Configuration Profiles</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="ID-00022bcb__d268e134"><div class="body conbody"><p class="p">You can use payload variables to populate configuration profile settings with computer, mobile device, or user attribute values stored in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. This allows you to deploy settings specific to each device or user. For example, you can display the unique serial number on the Lock Screen for an iPad.</p><div class="p">To use a payload variable, enter a variable from the list below into any text field when creating a configuration profile in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. When the profile is installed, the <code class="ph codeph">$VARIABLE</code> is replaced with the value of the corresponding attribute in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>.<div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">Payload variables are case-sensitive.</p></div></div><div class="table-wrap"><table class="table" count-columns="2"><caption></caption><colgroup><col style="width:28.57142857142857%" /><col style="width:71.42857142857143%" /></colgroup><thead class="thead"><tr class="row"><th class="entry colsep-1" id="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p">Variable</p></th><th class="entry colsep-1" id="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Inventory Information</p></th></tr></thead><tbody class="tbody"><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$MANAGEMENTID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Device management ID assigned by Jamf Pro</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><code class="ph codeph">$COMPUTERNAME</code></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Computer Name</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><code class="ph codeph">$SITENAME</code></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Site Name</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$SITEID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Site ID</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$UDID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">UDID</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$SERIALNUMBER</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Serial Number</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$USERNAME</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Username associated with the computer in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>
 (computer-level profiles only)</p><p class="p">Username of the user logging in to the computer
 (user-level profiles only)</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$FULLNAME</code> or <code class="ph codeph">$REALNAME</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Full Name</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$EMAIL</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Email Address</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$PHONE</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Phone Number</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$POSITION</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Position</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><code class="ph codeph">$DEPARTMENTNAME</code></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Department Name</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><code class="ph codeph">$DEPARTMENTID</code></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Department ID</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$BUILDINGNAME</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Building Name</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$BUILDINGID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Building ID</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$ROOM</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Room</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$MACADDRESS</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">MAC Address</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$JSSID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p"><span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> ID</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$PROFILEJSSID</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p"><span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> ID of the Configuration Profile</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__1"><p class="p"><code class="ph codeph">$EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE_#</code></p></td><td class="entry colsep-1" headers="ID-00022bcb__d268e134__entry__2"><p class="p">Extension Attribute ID Number</p><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">The ID number is found in the extension attribute URL. In the example URL below, "id=2" indicates the extension attribute ID number:</p><pre class="pre codeblock"><code><span class="ph">https://JAMF_PRO_URL.jamfcloud.com</span>/computerExtensionAttributes.html?id=2&o=r</code></pre></div><p class="p">For more information, see <a class="xref" href="Computer_Extension_Attributes.html#ID-0001c712">Computer Extension Attributes</a>.</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title3" class="topic reference nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="reference-1535"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title3"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#reference-1535__d268e451" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>General Requirements</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="reference-1535__d268e451"><div class="body refbody"><p class="shortdesc"> </p><section class="section" id="reference-1535__section-7989"><p class="p">To install a configuration profile on a computer, you need:</p><ul class="ul"><li class="li"><p class="p">A push certificate in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. For more information, see <a class="xref" href="Push_Certificates.html#concept-6218">Push Certificates</a>.</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">The <span class="ph uicontrol">Enable certificate-based authentication</span> and <span class="ph uicontrol">Enable push notifications</span> settings configured in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. For more information, see <a class="xref" href="Security_Settings.html#ID-000185c4">Security Settings</a>.</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">(User-level profiles only) Computers that are bound to a directory service or local user accounts that have been MDM-enabled. For information, see <a class="xref" href="Directory_Bindings.html#ID-00024807">Directory Bindings</a> and <a class="xref" href="MDM-Enabled_Local_User_Accounts.html#ID-00019c05">MDM-Enabled Local User Accounts</a>.</p></li></ul></section></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title4" class="topic task nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="ID-00022c87"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title4"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#ID-00022c87__d268e604" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Creating a Computer Configuration Profile in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> </h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="ID-00022c87__d268e604"><div class="body taskbody"><section class="section context"><div class="p">When creating and distributing computer configuration profiles directly in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, keep the following in mind:<ul class="ul"><li class="li"><p class="p">In the summary view, only the included or configured settings are displayed in the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> interface. </p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">Some enforced settings that do not change default values will not be visible on the computer. For more information on the default settings, see <a class="xref" href="https://developer.apple.com/documentation/devicemanagement/profile-specific_payload_keys" target="_blank">Profile-Specific Payload Keys</a> from the Apple Developer website.</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">If you distribute a configuration profile to a computer and also deploy a blueprint with a payload that contains conflicting keys, unexpected behavior may occur. For example, if keys within the <span class="ph uicontrol">Restrictions</span> payload conflict, the most restrictive setting will take precedence. For more information, see <a class="xref" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/jamf-pro-blueprints-configuration-guide/page/Blueprint_Builder.html" target="_blank">Blueprint Builder</a> in the <cite class="cite"><span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> Blueprints Configuration Guide</cite>.</p></li></ul></div></section><section class="section prereq"><div class="prereq_title">Requirements</div><p class="p">Before creating a configuration profile, you should have basic knowledge of configuration profile payloads and settings. For more information, see <a class="xref" href="https://support.apple.com/guide/deployment/dep9a318a393/" target="_blank">Plan your configuration profiles for Apple devices</a> in <cite class="cite">Apple Platform Deployment</cite>. </p><div class="p"><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">Some configuration profile payloads and settings available in Jamf Pro may differ from their implementation in Apple's tools.</p></div></div></section><section><ol class="ol steps"><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">In <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, click <span class="ph uicontrol">Computers</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24"><path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.5 4.75A2.75 2.75 0 003.75 7.5v7.306a2.25 2.25 0 00.5 4.444h15.5a2.25 2.25 0 00.5-4.444V7.5a2.75 2.75 0 00-2.75-2.75h-11zm13.25 11.5h-6.064c-.155.437-.571.75-1.061.75h-1.25c-.49 0-.906-.313-1.061-.75H4.25a.75.75 0 000 1.5h15.5a.75.75 0 000-1.5zm-1-1.5V7.5c0-.69-.56-1.25-1.25-1.25h-11c-.69 0-1.25.56-1.25 1.25v7.25h13.5z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".87" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Configuration Profiles</span> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">New</span>.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Use the General payload to configure basic settings, including the level at which to apply the profile and the distribution method.</span><div class="itemgroup info"><p class="p">Only payloads and settings that apply to the selected level are displayed for the profile.</p><p class="p">To distribute the profile during enrollment using a computer PreStage enrollment, ensure you create a computer-level configuration profile.</p></div></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Use the rest of the payloads to configure the settings.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Click the <span class="ph uicontrol">Scope</span> tab and specify the computers and users to which the profile should be applied.</span><div class="itemgroup info"><p class="p">To distribute the profile during enrollment using a computer PreStage enrollment, ensure the scope of the profile contains the computers that are in the scope of the PreStage enrollment.</p></div></li><li class="li step stepexpand">(Optional) <span class="ph cmd">If you chose to make the profile available in Self Service, click the <span class="ph uicontrol">Self Service</span> tab to configure Self Service settings for the profile.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Save</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" fill="currentColor" style="width: 24px; height: auto" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path d="M7.82 3.057a1.854 1.854 0 00-.681.308c-.215.154-3.576 3.717-3.79 4.017a2.43 2.43 0 00-.24.445l-.089.233-.012 5.64c-.009 4.106 0 5.705.034 5.878.129.673.617 1.183 1.306 1.362.346.09 14.958.09 15.304 0 .67-.174 1.114-.618 1.288-1.288.09-.346.09-14.958 0-15.304-.174-.67-.618-1.114-1.288-1.288-.198-.052-.998-.06-5.93-.057-4.429.003-5.747.015-5.902.054m6.68 2.872c0 1.318-.006 1.434-.071 3.102L6.5 19.5h-.929c-.838 0-.935-.007-1-.071-.067-.068-.072-.353-.081-5.53-.009-4.321 0-5.482.04-5.574.027-.064.815-.929 1.75-1.922l1.7-1.806.022 1.511c.013.899.04 1.561.065 1.632.221.63.656 1.038 to the deployment targets in the scope the next time they contact <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>.</p></section></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title5" class="topic task nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="ID-00022cab"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title5"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#ID-00022cab__d268e822" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Uploading a Configuration Profile</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="ID-00022cab__d268e822"><div class="body taskbody"><section class="section context"><p class="p">You can upload a complete configuration profile (<span class="ph filepath">.mobileconfig</span>) directly to <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>.</p><div class="p"><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <ul class="ul"><li class="li"><p class="p">If the <var class="keyword varname"><UUID></var> (universally unique identifier) field of a configuration profile matches an existing configuration profile in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, the profile cannot be uploaded.</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">Some payloads and settings configured with third-party software are not displayed in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. Although you cannot view or edit these payloads, they are still applied to the deployment targets.</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">If <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> encounters an unknown key in certain payloads, an alert displays in the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> user interface. The alert does not necessarily indicate an invalid profile, but signals that further review is needed. The approach to resolve unknown keys depends on whether the profile is signed or unsigned; however <span class="ph">Jamf</span> recommends downloading the profile before making modifications.</p></li></ul></div></div><div class="p">You can upload signed or unsigned configuration profiles:<div class="table-wrap"><table class="table" count-columns="2"><caption></caption><colgroup><col style="width:25%" /><col style="width:75%" /></colgroup><thead class="thead"><tr class="row"><th class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" id="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__1">Type of Profile</th><th class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" id="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__2">Considerations</th></tr></thead><tbody class="tbody"><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" headers="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__1">Signed</td><td class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" headers="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__2"><p class="p">Signed configuration profiles are not modified during the import or deployment processes. If the <code class="ph codeph"><PayloadType></code> or specific <code class="ph codeph"><key></code> values in the profile are unknown to <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, those values will not display in the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> user interface but should install correctly.</p><p class="p">After uploading a signed configuration profile, <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> will alert administrators that the profile is read-only and cannot be edited unless the signature is removed. If you click <span class="ph uicontrol">Remove Signature</span>, <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> will attempt to import the contents of the profile and allow administrators to edit it.</p><p class="p">If the configuration profile contains unknown keys, you can download the profile and verify the contents or fix any errors (e.g., incorrect formatting, invalid keys, etc.). Then, sign the profile and upload it again. </p><div class="p"><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">Signed configuration profiles cannot use configuration profile variables available in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>.</p></div></div><div class="p">You can create a signing certificate using <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>'s built-in certificate authority (CA). This enables you to sign profiles using <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>. Configuration profiles can be signed using the certificate of your choice, but creating a signing certificate generated by the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> CA provides the following benefits:<ul class="ul"><li class="li"><p class="p">Marks the custom configuration profiles as trusted since managed devices have established trust with the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> built-in CA</p></li><li class="li"><p class="p">Ensures the custom configuration profile displays the same organization name as other configuration profiles created in <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span></p></li></ul></div><p class="p">For step-by-step instructions, see the <a class="xref" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Creating_a_Signing_Certificate_Using_Jamf_Pros_Built-in_CA_to_Use_for_Signing_Configuration_Profiles_and_Packages.html" target="_blank">Creating a Signing Certificate Using Jamf Pro's Built-in CA to Use for Signing Configuration Profiles and Packages</a> article.</p></td></tr><tr class="row"><td class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" headers="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__1">Unsigned</td><td class="entry colsep-1 rowsep-1" headers="ID-00022cab__d268e822__entry__2"><p class="p"><span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> attempts to import all of the file's values to associate with known settings within the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> console and allow further editing. If the <code class="ph codeph"><PayloadType></code> or specific <code class="ph codeph"><key></code> values in the profile are unknown to <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, the deployed configuration profile may not contain those values or install correctly. You can directly view and remove unknown keys in the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> user interface. This action cannot be reversed.</p><div class="p"><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">Unsigned profiles with payload types and key-value pairs known to <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> should deploy as intended.</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></section><section><ol class="ol steps"><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">In <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, click <span class="ph uicontrol">Computers</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24"><path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.5 4.75A2.75 2.75 0 003.75 7.5v7.306a2.25 2.25 0 00.5 4.444h15.5a2.25 2.25 0 00.5-4.444V7.5a2.75 2.75 0 00-2.75-2.75h-11zm13.25 11.5h-6.064c-.155.437-.571.75-1.061.75h-1.25c-.49 0-.906-.313-1.061-.75H4.25a.75.75 0 000 1.5h15.5a.75.75 0 000-1.5zm-1-1.5V7.5c0-.69-.56-1.25-1.25-1.25h-11c-.69 0-1.25.56-1.25 1.25v7.25h13.5z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".87" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Configuration Profiles</span> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Upload</span> and upload the configuration profile (<span class="ph filepath">.mobileconfig</span>).</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Use the <span class="ph uicontrol">General</span> payload to change or configure basic settings for the profile, including a distribution method.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click the <span class="ph uicontrol">Scope</span> tab and specify the computers and users to which the profile should be applied.</span></li><li class="li step">(Optional) <span class="ph cmd">If you chose to distribute the profile in Self Service, click the <span class="ph uicontrol">Self Service</span> tab to configure Self Service settings for the profile.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Save</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" fill="currentColor" style="width: 24px; height: auto" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path d="M7.82 3.057a1.854 1.854 0 00-.681.308c-.215.154-3.576 3.717-3.79 4.017a2.43 2.43 0 00-.24.445l-.089.233-.012 5.64c-.009 4.106 0 5.705.034 5.878.129.673.617 1.183 1.306 1.362.346.09 14.958.09 15.304 0 .67-.174 1.114-.618 1.288-1.288.09-.346.09-14.958 0-15.304-.174-.67-.618-1.114-1.288-1.288-.198-.052-.998-.06-5.93-.057-4.429.003-5.747.015-5.902.054m6.68 2.872c0 1.318-.006 1.434-.071 1.5-.067.067-.22.071-2.429.071-2.209 0-2.362-.004-2.429-.071-.065-.066-.072-.19-.083-1.458-.006-.762-.002-1.409.009-1.438.017-.044.471-.052 2.512-.043l2.491.01v1.429m4.929-1.358c.068.068.071.421.071 7.429 0 7.007-.003 7.361-.071 7.429-.065.064-.162.071-1 .071H17.5l-.02-3.102-.02-3.102-.15-.304a1.754 1.754 0 00-1.225-.951c-.294-.056-7.876-.056-8.17 0-.518.097-.98.456-1.225.951l-.15.304-.02 3.102L6.5 19.5h-.929c-.838 0-.935-.007-1-.071-.067-.068-.072-.353-.081-5.53-.009-4.321 0-5.482.04-5.574.027-.064.815-.929 1.75-1.922l1.7-1.806.022 1.511c.013.899.04 1.561.065 1.632.221.63.656 1.038 1.281 1.2.34.089 4.964.089 5.304 0 .67-.174 1.114-.618 1.288-1.288.048-.183.06-.525.06-1.702V4.477l1.679.012c1.549.01 1.684.017 1.75.082m-3.534 8.992l.105.083v5.874H8v-5.874l.105-.083c.105-.083.122-.083 3.895-.083s3.79 0 3.895.083"></path></svg>.</span></li></ol></section><section class="section result"><p class="p">You can also use the <span class="ph uicontrol">Application & Custom Settings</span> payload to customize a configuration profile. For more information, see the <a class="xref" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Deploying_Custom_Computer_Configuration_Profiles_Using_the_Application_and_Custom_Settings_Payload.html" target="_blank">Deploying Custom Computer Configuration Profiles Using the Application & Custom Settings Payload</a> article.</p></section></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title6" class="topic task nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="task-7450" lang="en-us"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title6"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#task-7450__d268e1135" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Editing the Settings or Scope of a Configuration Profile</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="task-7450__d268e1135"><div class="body taskbody"><section><ol class="ol steps"><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">In <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, click <span class="ph uicontrol">Computers</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; On those computers with the profile already installed, the existing profile will be uninstalled and the newly edited profile will then be installed.</span></li><li class="dlentry"><span class="dt dlterm">Distribute to Newly Assigned Devices Only</span><span>—</span><span class="dd">The configuration profile will be distributed only to computers in scope that do not already have the profile installed. taskbody"><section class="section context"><p class="p">For each configuration profile, you can view the number of the deployment targets with a status of Complete, Remaining, or Failed for the profile installation.</p><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">Depending on your system configuration, status data may not be available for profiles installed using <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> 9.63 or earlier.</p></div></section><section><ol class="ol steps"><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">In <span class="ph">Jamf Then click <span class="ph uicontrol">Back</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path d="M10.18 3.837c-.11.051-1.358 1.275-4.007 3.929-3.992 4-3.933 3.936-3.933 4.234 0 .298-.059.234 3.933 4.234 2.649 2.654 3.897 3.878 4.007 3.929a.758.758 0 00.64.002.61.61 0 00.358-.375.746.746 0 00.001-.581c-.043-.105-1-1.088-3.21-3.299L4.82 12.76h8.12c5.801 0 8.165-.013 8.279-.045.212-.058.441-.293.5-.511.089-.331-.03-.638-.325-.832l-.168-.112-8.193-.02-8.193-.02L7.964 8.1c2.134-2.131 3.148-3.171 3.199-3.28a.758.758 0 00.002-.64.61.61 0 00-.375-.358.746.746 0 00-.61.015" fill="currentColor" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> in the top-left corner of the pane.</span><div class="itemgroup info"><div class="p"><div class="note note note_note"><span class="note__title">Note:</span> <p class="p">If a device becomes unmanaged after a profile is successfully distributed to it, the profile will continue to be displayed in the Completed column.</p></div></div></div></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">To view logs for a configuration profile, click <span class="ph uicontrol">View</span> in the corresponding row. For a different date range, specify the starting and ending dates using the <span class="ph uicontrol">Date Range</span> pop-up calendars.</span></li><li class="li step stepexpand"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Back</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path d="M10.18 3.837c-.11.051-1.358 1.275-4.007 3.929-3.992 4-3.933 3.936-3.933 4.234 0 .298-.059.234 3.933 4.234 2.649 2.654 3.897 3.878 4.007 3.929a.758.758 0 00.64.002.61.61 0 00.358-.375.746.746 0 00.001-.581c-.043-.105-1-1.088-3.21-3.299L4.82 12.76h8.12c5.801 0 8.165-.013 8.279-.045.212-.058.441-.293.5-.511.089-.331-.03-.638-.325-.832l-.168-.112-8.193-.02-8.193-.02L7.964 8.1c2.134-2.131 3.148-3.171 3.199-3.28a.758.758 0 00.002-.64.61.61 0 00-.375-.358.746.746 0 00-.61.015" fill="currentColor" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> in the top-left corner of the pane.</span></li></ol></section></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title9" class="topic task nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="ID-00022cfd"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title9"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#ID-00022cfd__d268e1601" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Troubleshooting a Failed Status of a Configuration Profile</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="ID-00022cfd__d268e1601"><div class="body taskbody"><section class="section steps-informal"><p class="p">If a profile fails to install on a compatible computer, <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> will automatically retry the deployment every six hours. To manually force the attempt, use the “Send blank push” management command. To access this feature, navigate to the <span class="ph uicontrol">Management</span> tab in the inventory of a computer and click <span class="ph uicontrol">Management Commands</span>.</p><p class="p">If a profile fails to install on an incompatible computer (e.g., when the profile includes settings that require User Approved MDM), the computer must first meet the profile requirements for the retry attempt to happen.</p></section></div></div></article><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title10" class="topic task nested1 MCDropDown MCDropDown_Closed dropDown" id="task-337"><div class="MCDropDownHeadWrapper"><h2 class="title topictitle2 collapse-title" id="ariaid-title10"><a aria-expanded="true" class="skipEvent" data-target="#task-337__d268e1714" data-toggle="collapse" href="#"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></a>Adding a Computer Configuration Profile to the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> Dashboard</h2></div><div class="div MCDropDownBody collapse show" id="task-337__d268e1714"><div class="body taskbody"><p class="shortdesc"> </p><section class="section context"><p class="p">Adding a computer configuration profile to the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> dashboard helps you monitor its status and progress. For example, you can determine which computers have received restrictions or settings, which computers are pending receiving the configuration profile, and if any profiles have failed to deploy and require troubleshooting.</p><p class="p">If you have configured a restriction or system setting configuration profile, you can track its deployment progress by adding it to the Jamf Pro dashboard. This would allow you to view all Completed, Pending, and Failed statuses for the configuration profile.</p></section><section><ol class="ol steps"><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">In <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span>, click <span class="ph uicontrol">Computers</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M6.5 4.75A2.75 2.75 0 003.75 7.5v7.306a2.25 2.25 0 00.5 4.444h15.5a2.25 2.25 0 00.5-4.444V7.5a2.75 2.75 0 00-2.75-2.75h-11zm13.25 11.5h-6.064c-.155.437-.571.75-1.061.75h-1.25c-.49 0-.906-.313-1.061-.75H4.25a.75.75 0 000 1.5h15.5a.75.75 0 000-1.5zm-1-1.5V7.5c0-.69-.56-1.25-1.25-1.25h-11c-.69 0-1.25.56-1.25 1.25v7.25h13.5z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".87" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> at the top of the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Configuration Profiles</span> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click the computer configuration profile you want to add to the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> dashboard.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Select the <span class="ph uicontrol">Show in Jamf Pro Dashboard</span> checkbox.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click <span class="ph uicontrol">Dashboard</span> <svg class="image cmdimage" data-fancy="noexpand" style="width: 24px; height: auto;" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20"><path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M3.75 3.88A1.88 1.88 0 015.63 2h3.74a1.88 1.88 0 011.88 1.88v2.99a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88 1.88H5.63a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88-1.88V3.88zm1.88-.38a.38.38 0 00-.38.38v2.99c0 .21.17.38.38.38h3.74c.21 0 .38-.17.38-.38V3.88a.38.38 0 00-.38-.38H5.63zm7.12.38A1.88 1.88 0 0114.63 2h3.74a1.88 1.88 0 011.88 1.88v7.99a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88 1.88h-3.74a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88-1.88V3.88zm1.88-.38a.38.38 0 00-.38.38v7.99c0 .21.17.38.38.38h3.74c.21 0 .38-.17.38-.38V3.88a.38.38 0 00-.38-.38h-3.74zM3.75 12.13a1.88 1.88 0 011.88-1.88h3.74a1.88 1.88 0 011.88 1.88v7.99A1.88 1.88 0 019.37 22H5.63a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88-1.88v-7.99zm1.88-.38a.38.38 0 00-.38.38v7.99c0 .21.17.38.38.38h3.74c.21 0 .38-.17.38-.38v-7.99a.38.38 0 00-.38-.38H5.63zm7.12 5.38a1.88 1.88 0 011.88-1.88h3.74a1.88 1.88 0 011.88 1.88v2.99A1.88 1.88 0 0118.37 22h-3.74a1.88 1.88 0 01-1.88-1.88v-2.99zm1.88-.38a.38.38 0 00-.38.38v2.99c0 .21.17.38.38.38h3.74c.21 0 .38-.17.38-.38v-2.99a.38.38 0 00-.38-.38h-3.74z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".87" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="none"></path></svg> in the sidebar.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Navigate to the <span class="keyword wintitle">macOS Configuration Profile Distribution Statuses</span> area of the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> dashboard and find the widget for the computer configuration profile you added.</span></li><li class="li step"><span class="ph cmd">Click any item in the widget to view the details.</span></li></ol></section><section class="section result">Computers that have been scoped to the configuration profile have their progress tracked in both the circular percentage graph and below the graph by status category. Use this information to troubleshoot any computers that have Failed or Pending statuses by clicking the status hyperlinks and reviewing the computers presented.</section></div></div></article></article></article></main></article>

<script>var msgDone            = "Your PDF job is done.";
var msgQueue           = "Your PDF job is still in queue.";
var msgProgres         = "Your PDF job is in progress. It will soon be ready.";
var msgFailed          = "Your PDF job failed. Please restart it.";
var msgPreprocess      = "We're preprocessing your PDF job. Please wait.";
var msgPdfNotAvailable = "PDF generation services are currently not available.";
function jobStatus(url,isRecheck) {var random       = Math.random();
var refreshDelay = (5 + random) * 1000;
$.ajax({url:      url,
dataType: 'json',
cache: false,
type:     'GET',}).done(function (job) {switch(job.status) {case "JobReserved":pdfInformUser(msgPreprocess);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobDone":console.log("DONE time: "  + new Date($.now()) + " >> Next check in: " + refreshDelay + " ms");
console.log("DONE dwnl: "  + job.isDownloaded);
console.log("DONE toke: "  + job.token);
console.log("DONE titl: "  + job.title);if (job.isDownloaded) {console.log("*** Other tab downloaded it *** >> " + job.token);$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
} else {if (isRecheck) {console.log("*** DOWNLOADING *** >> " + job.token);pdfInformUser(msgDone);
window.location.href=job.downloadUrl;
} else {console.log("*** Should download, checking again after 1 sec  *** >> " + job.token);$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,true);}, 1000);
}
}
$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
$('.message').fadeOut();
break;
case "JobInQueue":pdfInformUser(msgQueue);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobInProgress":pdfInformUser(msgProgres);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobPdfNotAvailable":pdfInformUser(msgPdfNotAvailable);case "JobFailed":
default:pdfInformUser(msgFailed);}
}).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {console.log("textStatus: "  + textStatus);
console.log("errorThrown: " + errorThrown);
console.log("status: "      + response.status);});}
function pdfInformUser(msg) {$('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message">'+ msg +'</div>');
$('#pdfMessageDiv').html("<div>" + msg + "</div>");
$('#pdfMessageDiv').show();}</script>

// no-cache
// *************************************************************************************
// Data supplied by backend on every page load
// *************************************************************************************
// Interpolation vars available to templates
// - Permissions:
//     canDelete favCRUD
//     canRead   favCRUD
//     canUpdate favCRUD
//     canCreate favCRUD
// - Action URLs
//   - favArticleUrl
//   - favCollUrl
//   - favCollAddUrl
//   - favTopicUrl
//   - favTopicInfoUrl
//   - favMoveUrl
// - Initial values
//   - favCollections as HTML
//   - favDefCollTopics as HTML
//   - favFavCollTopics as HTML
//   - favCollWidget as widget
//   - favShareCollections as HTML
//   - favShareDefCollTopics as HTML
//   - favFavouritesCollId as Int

// - PDF related:
//   - favPdfGetUrl
//   - favPdfTitleUrl
//   - favPdfAutoToc
//   - favPdfSuggest
//   - favPdfShowDlg
//   - favPdfDefTitle
// - Automatic article opening
//   - favAutoCollId
//   - favAutoArtContent

var userCollections     = null;
var defCollItems        = null;
var favCollItems        = null;
var favAutoCollId       = null;
var favPdfAutoToc       = false;
var favAutoArtContent   = null;
var favFavouritesCollId = null;
var favCanDelete        = false;
var favCanRead          = false;
var favCanUpdate        = false;
var favCanCreate        = false;

var message ="";

if (userCollections     == undefined) { userCollections     = [];    }
if (defCollItems        == undefined) { defCollItems        = [];    }
if (favCollItems        == undefined) { favCollItems        = [];    }
if (favAutoCollId       == undefined) { favAutoCollId       = 0;     }
if (favAutoArtContent   == undefined) { favAutoArtContent   = "";    }
if (favFavouritesCollId == undefined) { favFavouritesCollId = 0;     }
if (favCanDelete        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanRead          == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanUpdate        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanCreate        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }

// *************************************************************************************
// Ajax functions for communication with backend.
// Each function supplies a '.fail' function which displays a dialog box
// *************************************************************************************

// Get all Collections for the User
// Request:
// JSON: { "crWithCounts":   Bool
//       , "crSortBy":       "CSAlpha" or "CSCount"
//       , "crFilter":       Text // not used yet
//       , "crPage":         Int
//       , "crItemsPerPage": Int
//       , "crHtmlOnly":     Bool
//       }
// Responses: code - 200 (OK)
// JSON: [{ "count": Int
//          "isShared": Bool
//          "collection": { "id":          Int
//                        , "title":       Text
//                        , "isDefault":   Bool
//                        , "isFavourite": Bool
//                        , "stateHash":   Text
//                        }
//       }]
//  or  {"html": Text}
function getAllCollectionsAjax(withCounts, sortBy, page, perPage, htmlOnly) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:      'https://learn-be.jamf.com/api/mydocs/collections',
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
    data:      JSON.stringify({ "crWithCounts":   withCounts
                              , "crSortBy":       sortBy
                              , "crFilter":       ""
                              , "crPage":         page
                              , "crItemsPerPage": perPage
                              , "crHtmlOnly":     htmlOnly
                              })
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
       switch (response.status){
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    $('#rename-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

// Create new Collection
// Responses:
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed
//   code - 409 (Conflict)          - Collection already exists
//   code - 201 (Created)
//          header 'Location'  = full link to new Collection
//          header 'NewId'     = Collection's new ID
//   JSON: {"html": widget for collection}
function addCollectionAjax(collName) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null + collName,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'PUT'
  }).done(function(){
      $.magnificPopup.close();
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    switch (response.status){
        case 409:
            message = 'A collection with the name "'+collName+ '" already exists.\r\n'+
            'Please enter a new collection name to proceed.';
            break;
        case 400:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed";
            break;
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - No collection name ";
    }
    //console.log('message', message);
    $('#create-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
    $('#create-popup .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

// Rename collection
// Request: JSON {"cpNewName": [newName,currtopics Count]}
// Responses:
//   code - 404 (Not Found)
//   code - 200 (OK)
//    JSON: { "rename": Bool -- success or not
//          , "html": widget for collection with new name}
function renameCollectionAjax(collId, newName, currCount){
  return $.ajax({
    url:      null + collId,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
    data:      JSON.stringify({ "cpNewName": [newName,currCount]})
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    //console.log('response.status', response.status);
    switch (response.status){
        case 409:
            message = "Bad action: "+response.status+" Collection name already exists";
            break;
        case 400:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed";
            break;
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    $('#rename-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

// Return article for the topic
// Responses:
//   code - 403 (Forbidden)
//   code - 404 (Not Found)
//   code - 200 (OK)
// JSON: { "content":       Text
//       , "title":         Text
//       , "addedOn":       Text
//       , "rating":        Text
//       , "views":         Text
//       , "watched"        If user allowed watching - Bool, if not - field not present
//       , "attachments"    List
//       , "allAttachments" Text
//       , "topicAttachments"    List
//       , "allTopicAttachments" Text
//       , "topicMeta"      List (name::Text,value::Text)
//       , "type":          Text (HTML,resource,error)
//       And depending on the type, only one of the following:
//         , "html".        Text
//         , "resource"     URL
//         , "error"        Text
//       And depending on whether available, zero or more of the following:
//       , "created":       Text
//       , "revised":       Text
//       , "watermark":     Text (HTML)
//       }
function getArticleAjax(collId, content) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null + collId + "/" + content,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
     success: function(){
    //console.log(null + collId + "/" + content);
    }
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
       switch (response.status){
        case 403:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Not allowed ";
            // alert("Not allowed");
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";

    $('#delete-topic .form-error > p').text(message);

  });

// Get suggested title for selected (or all) topics for PDF generation
// Param 'topics' is a pair (topic,Bool). Boole signifies if children should be included
// Responses:
//   code - 200 (Created) JSON: {"title": Text}
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed
//   code - 404 (Not Found)         - Page not found
function pdfSuggestTitleAjax(collId, topics) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
    data:      JSON.stringify({
       "fpCollId": collId
     , "fpTopics": topics
     , "fpTitle":  ""
     , "fpToC":    false
     // , "fpCustom": "" // must be ommited because it is a Maybe
     , "fpHasMany": false // just to fill record, not used
    })
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    switch (response.status){
        case 404:
            mesaage = "Bad Action" + response.status + " Invalid arguments - Insert failed";
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    //console.log('Error message: ', message);

  });
};

// Generate PDF for selected (or all) topics
// Param 'topics' is a pair (topic,Bool). Boole signifies if children should be included
// Responses:
//   code - 200 (Created) JSON: {"url": Text}
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - JSON not formed properly
//   code - 404 (Not Found)         - Collection not found
function pdfGeneratePOST(collId,topics,title,toc,content,custom,hasMany) {
  var jsonData = JSON.stringify({ "fpCollId": collId
                                , "fpTopics": topics
                                , "fpTitle":  title
                                , "fpToC":    toc
                                , "fpCustom": custom
                                , "fpHasMany": hasMany
                                });
  //console.log(jsonData);
  var form = $('<form method="POST" action="' + null + '">');
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='pdfData' value='" + jsonData +        "'>"));
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='content' value='" + content +         "'>"));
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='url'     value='" + window.location
                                                              + "#"
                                                              + custom + "'>"));
  $('body').append(form);
  form.submit();
  form.hide();
};



// Function called on Ajax fail
// confirmation popup
// gets a string to display in the popup
// popup's up a message to user.
function popupConfirmation(message){
  $("#confirm p.right").text(message);
  $("#confirm").removeClass('hidden');
  $("#confirm").dialog({
     dialogClass: "no-close",
     resizable: false,
     height: "auto",
     width: 400,
     modal: true,
     buttons: {
       "Close": function() {
          $( this ).dialog( "close" );
        }
     }
  });
};

// onClick action for elements that add Bundle to MyDocs.
// Must have attribute "slug" and attribute "collId"
$(".addBundleToMyDocs").click(function() {
  var elem      = $("#ajaxMessage")
  var slug      = $( this ).attr('slug');
  var collId    = $( this ).attr('collId');
  var custTitle = $( this ).attr('custTitle');

  elem.html("Bundle is being added to your MyDocs. You will be notified when the process is finished.");
  autoHideAfter(elem,5);
  $ajax = addBundleAjax(1, [slug], custTitle);
  $ajax.done(function (data) {
    elem.html("Bundle has been added to your MyDocs.");
    autoHideAfter(elem,5);
  });
});

// Show element and hide it after specified seconds
function autoHideAfter(elem,secs) {
  elem.show();
  setTimeout(function(){$(elem).hide();}, secs * 1000);
}

/*------------Close Ann and Redirect-------------*/
function dismissAndRedirect(annUrl,nextUrl,elem) {
  if (nextUrl) {
    $(elem).hide();
    $.ajax({
      url:      annUrl,
      dataType: 'json',
      type:     'PUT',
      data:     JSON.stringify({ "annPatchDismiss": true})
    }).done(function (data) {
      window.location.href = nextUrl;
    }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
      console.error("Can't delete Announcement: " + response.responseText + "  ~~  " + errorThrown);
    });
  }
};
$(function(){
    $('.custom-checkbox').on('click', function() {
        if ($(this).find('input').prop('checked')) {
            !$(this).find('input').prop('checked', false);
        }
        else {
            !$(this).find('input').prop('checked', true)
        }

    });


    /* Fix buggy iPad label behavior: http://v4.thewatchmakerproject.com/blog/how-to-fix-the-broken-ipad-form-label-click-issue/ */
    if (navigator.userAgent.match(/iPhone/i) || navigator.userAgent.match(/iPod/i) || navigator.userAgent.match(/iPad/i)) {
        $('label[for]').click(function () {
            var el = $(this).attr('for');
            if ($('#' + el + '[type=radio], #' + el + '[type=checkbox]').attr('selected', !$('#' + el).attr('selected'))) {
                return;
            } else {
                $('#' + el)[0].focus();
            }
        });
    }
    $(".labels li").has("ul").addClass("open_arrow");
    $(".labels li ul li").has("ul").addClass("closed");

    //open checked checkbox's ancestors so the check is visible
    //$(".list-links li input").filter(":checked").parents('li.has-dd').addClass('isOpen');
    //$(".list-links li input").filter(":checked").siblings('ul.list-links').addClass('visible').parents('ul.list-links').addClass('visible');

   // Set up open/close for the containers
    $("li.label").has("ul").click(function(event){
        if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
        $(this).toggleClass("closed");
    });

    $("searcharea li.container").click(function(event){
        if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
        $(this).toggleClass("closed");
    });

    var filterChangedHelper = function(x){
        try {
            onFilterChanged(x);
        }
        catch(e) {
        }
    }

    // Checking/unchecking the group boxes affects the labels
    $("input.inputcheckbox").change(function(){
        var $gbox = $(this);
        var total = 0, checked = 0;
        $.each($gbox.parent().find("input.inputcheckbox"), function(_i, l){
            ++total;
            if ($(l).is(":checked")) ++checked;
        });

      //auto check/uncheck if all descendants are in the same state as the clicked box
        if ($gbox.is(":checked") && checked == 1) {
            $gbox.parent().find("li:not(.hidden-facet) input.inputcheckbox").prop("checked", true);
        }
        else if (! $gbox.is(":checked") && total == checked+1){
            $gbox.parent().find("input.inputcheckbox").prop("checked", false);
        }

        // Open 2nd 3rd level filters if checked facets
        $('.inputcheckbox').each(function(){
            if ( $(this).is(':checked') ){
                $(this).siblings('.toggle').addClass('active');
                $(this).siblings('.zDocsSideFilter > ul').addClass('active');
            }
        });

      filterChangedHelper(this);
    });

    $(".labels li").not(".open_arrow").addClass("less_padding");
});

var isFilterOpen = false;

function clickAdvanced () {
    $("#advanced").toggle();
    $("a.advancedlink").toggleClass("open");
    isFilterOpen = ! isFilterOpen;
    if (isFilterOpen) {
	$("#filteropen").attr("value", "yes");
    } else {
	$("#filteropen").attr("value", "no");
    }
    return false;
}

$(function(){

    $('.link-popup').on('click', function() {
      if( $(this).parent('li').hasClass('bundle') ) {
        // $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').removeAttr("id");
        $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').addClass('addBundleToMyDocs');
      } else {
        $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').removeClass('addBundleToMyDocs');
        // $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').attr("id", "add");
      }

    });

    // Initialize Collections In Dropdown
    for (var i=0; i< userCollections.length; i++)
    {
      if (userCollections.length === 1 && userCollections[0].count === 0)
      {
        $('#field-collection').append('<option value="' + userCollections[i].collId +'" '+ (userCollections[i].coll.isDefault ? "" : "")+'>'
				+ userCollections[i].coll.title+'</option>');
	      $('#field-collection option[value='+ userCollections[i].collId+']').prop('selected', false);
      }
      else {
          $('#field-collection').append('<option value="' + userCollections[i].collId +'" '+ (userCollections[i].coll.isDefault ? "class='default'" : "")+'>'
          + userCollections[i].coll.title+'</option>');
          $('#field-collection option[value='+ userCollections[i].collId+']').prop('selected', true);
          //$('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
          }
    }

    // Add collection creation option only if user has create permissions
    if (favCanCreate) {
      if (userCollections.length === 1 && userCollections[0].count === 0) {
        $('#field-collection').prepend('<option class="new-collection">-- New Collection --</option>');
        $('#field-collection .new-collection').prop('selected', true);
      } else {
        $('#field-collection').append('<option class="new-collection">-- New Collection --</option>');
        $('#field-collection option.new-collection').prop('selected', false);
      }
    }

    //collection change event. when user chnges the value in dropdown.
    $('#field-collection').on('change',function(){
        //get selected collection name
      var collection_name = $('#field-collection option[selected=true]').val();
        //console.log('collection_name: ', collection_name);
        //console.log('collection_name: ',  $('#field-collection option[selected=true]').attr('value'));

        //if create collection has been selected start create collection process:
        // 1. create the new collection
        // 2. add current topic to newly created collection.
        if ($(this).val() == '-- New Collection --')
        {
            initPopup( '#create-popup', '' );
            var ua = window.navigator.userAgent;
            var msie = ua.indexOf("MSIE ");
            if (msie > 0 || !!navigator.userAgent.match(/Trident.*rv\:11\./)) {
                return false;
            } else $('#field-collection-name').focus();
        }
        else{
          $('#field-collection option.new-collection').prop('selected', false);
        }
    });

    // Add to Collection Click Event
    // Asaf: I replaced class=add-topic with id=add
    $('#add').on('click', function(event){
      if ($('.fs-dropdown-item_selected').attr('data-value') != '-- New Collection --')
      {
        //console.log(" $('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value')", $('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value'));
        //console.log("val",$('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value'));
        var $ajax = doesTopicExistAjax($('.fs-dropdown-item.fs-dropdown-item_selected').attr('data-value'), $('article[data-page]').attr('data-page'));
        $ajax.done(function (data) {
            $('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message message-error"><p>This topic (or map) has already been added to that collection.</p><div class="action-wrapper"><a href="#0" class="confirm-btn">Continue</a><a href="#0" class="link-close">Cancel</a></div></div>');
            $('.message.message-error').show();

              $('.message.message-error .confirm-btn').off().on('click', function(event){
                  event.preventDefault();
                  setTimeout(function() { $(".message").fadeOut(); }, 3000);
                  $(".message").remove();

                  addTopicToCollection();
              });

              $('.message.message-error .link-close').off().on('click', function(event){
                  event.preventDefault();
                  setTimeout(function() { $(".message").fadeOut(); }, 3000);
                  $(".message").remove();
              });
        });
        $ajax.fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
            if (response.status === 404)
            {
                addTopicToCollection();
            }

        });

        // $('.section-contents .section-content').css('opacity', '1');
        //To close the dropdown after successfully adding to an existing collection
        $('.link-close').trigger('click');
        $('#field-collection option.default').attr('selected', true);
       }
       else{
        //To open the create new collection popup
        console.log('create popup');
        initPopup( '#create-popup', '' );
      }
    });

    $('.list-actions .has-dropdown > ul').on('click', function(event) {
	   event.stopPropagation();
	});


    //------------Load the toc-------------------
    $.getJSON( tocUrl, function( response ) {
         // Each sub-TOC
         $.each(response, function (key, value){
             $('#'+key).append(value);
             $('#'+key).children('.tocLoader').remove();
         });

        // TOC Second Level+
        $("li li.navcontainer").click(function(event){
             if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
             $(this).toggleClass("closed");
         });

         $('.widget .list-links li').each(function() {
             var $li = $(this);

             if ( $li.find(' ul > li').length ) {
                 $li.addClass('has-dd').addClass('isOpen').find('> ul').addClass('visible');

                 if ( !$li.find('> .dd-trigger').length ) {
                     $li.prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
                 };
             } else {
                 $li.removeClass('has-dd').removeClass('isOpen');
                 $li.find('.dd-trigger').remove();
                 $li.find('> ul').remove();
             }
         });

          // Open toc at current location
          $('li a.current').parents('li').addClass('isOpen');
          $('li a.current').parents('ul').addClass('visible');

        /*----------------Previous and Next Buttons-----------------*\
        \*----------------------------------------------------------*/
        if( $(".list-links a.current").length )
        var getID = $(".list-links a.current").closest('li[id^="nav"]').attr('id').split('-')[1];
        if( (getID==1) && (getID != undefined) ){
          $("a.previous").addClass('disabled');
        }

        if ( !($(".list-links a.current").closest('li.toc').next('li.toc').length) ) {
          $("a.next").addClass('disabled');
        }

         //Expand TOC
         $(".link-expand").click(function(event){
              event.preventDefault();
              $('.widget .has-dd').addClass('isOpen');
              $('.widget  .list-links').addClass('visible');
            });

         // Collapse TOC
         $(".link-collapse").click(function(event){
              event.preventDefault();
              $('.widget  .has-dd').removeClass('isOpen');
              $('.widget  .list-links').removeClass('visible');
            });

    }).fail(function() { /*TBD*/ });

    //first toc level
    $("li.navcontainer").click(function(event){
             if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
             $(this).toggleClass("closed");
         });
});

function findEmbeddedSwaggerSpecFilename() {
  const swaggerSpecPlaceholder = document.querySelector('#swagger-spec[data-href]');
    if (swaggerSpecPlaceholder) {
      return swaggerSpecPlaceholder.getAttribute('data-href');
    }
    return undefined;
}

function renderSwagger() {
  const swaggerContainer = document.getElementById('swagger-spec').outerHTML;
  $('article').html(swaggerContainer);
  const configFileName = findEmbeddedSwaggerSpecFilename();
  const dom_id = 'swagger-spec';
  const domNode = document.getElementById('swagger-spec');
  const url = location.href.substring(0, location.href.indexOf('/page/')) + '/page/' + configFileName;

  setTimeout(function() {
    SwaggerUIBundle({
       dom_id, domNode, url
    });
  });
}

    function createNew() {
      $('#create-popup .create-new').off().on( "click", function(event) {
        event.preventDefault();

        if ($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length > 0  && $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length < 41)
        {
            if(/^[a-zA-Z0-9- ]*$/.test($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val()) == false) {
                $('#create-popup .form-error > p').text("Please use alphabetic and numeric characters only.");
            }
            else {
             $ajax = createNewCollection($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val());
             $ajax.done(function(){
                var set_default = $('#default-collection').is(':checked');

                if (set_default){
                     setTimeout(function(){

                     var collection = $('#field-collection option:contains("'+$('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val()+'")');
                     var collection_id = collection.attr('value');

                     //console.log('collection',collection);
                     //console.log('collection_id', collection_id);
                        $ajax = setDefaultCollectionAjax(collection_id);
                    }, 1000);
                }

                if (favCanUpdate){
                    console.log('if favCanUpdate');
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        addTopicToCollection();
                    }, 1000);
                }

             });

                //console.log('create endded successfully.');
             };
        }
        else if ($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length === 0)
        {
            $(this).closest('#create-popup').find(' .form-error > p').text('You must specify a collection name.');
            $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').css('border', '2pt solid #CE1126');
        }
        else
        {
            $(this).closest('#create-popup').find(' .form-error > p').text('Collection name must contain up to 40 characters .');
            $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').css('border', '2pt solid #CE1126');
        }
      });
    };
    createNew();

		// Close popup

			$('.link-close').on( "click", function(event) {
				event.preventDefault();
      				//console.log('I am closing it', $('.has-dropdown'));
      				$.magnificPopup.close();
              $('.wrapper').css('opacity', '1');
              $('.section-content, .section-aside').css('opacity', '1');
              $('.has-dropdown').removeClass(".dropdown-visible");
              $('.has-dropdown').removeClass("dropdown-visible");
              $('.section-contents  .section-content, .section-aside').css('opacity', '1');
              $('a').each(function(){
                  $(this).css('pointer-events','auto');
	            $(this).css('cursor','pointer');
	        });
			});
		};

		// Open Popup if Present in HTML
		$win.on('load', function() {
			if( $('.popup-onload').length ) {
				var id = '#' + $('.popup').attr('id');

				// Open Popup
				openPopup(id);
			}
		});

		// Popup populate and display function
		window.initPopup = function(id, msg) {

			// Populate popup
			$('.popup' + id).find('.popup-body p').text( msg );

			// Open Popup
			openPopup(id);

        }
    };

  // Change Tags Layout
  function splitTags(obj){
        var tags = $(obj).text();
        var tags_array = tags.split(';');
        var new_tags_string = "";

      for (var i = 0; i< tags_array.length; i++) {
        var current_tags = tags_array[i].replace(/>/g, " | ");
        for (var j=0; j< current_tags.length; j++) {
          new_tags_string += current_tags[j];
        }
        if ((i+1)<tags_array.length){
          new_tags_string+= " | ";
        }
      }
      $(obj).text(new_tags_string);
  };

  splitTags($('.labels'));

// ***** DOC TABLE FEATURES: *****
function zDocsTables() {
  var tableCount = 1; // used to identify each table
  $('article table').each(function() {
    var table = $(this);
    var isSmartTable = table.hasClass('smart');
    var numberOfRowsInTable = table.find('tr').length;
    if (isSmartTable ||
        applySmartTablesForRowsGreaterThan === 0 ||
        applySmartTablesForRowsGreaterThan >= numberOfRowsInTable) {
      var header = table.find('tr:eq(0)');
      var headerCell = header.find('> *');
      table.addClass('data-table-' + tableCount);

      // dataTable functionality
      var dataTable = table.DataTable({ // calls function from datatables.js
        paging: false,
        info: false,
        autoWidth: true,
        ordering: enableTableSort
      });

      if (enableTableFilter) { // column search
        // add search boxes to each column
        var searchRowID = 'search-row-' + tableCount;
        var SearchRowHtmlString = '<tr class="' + header.attr('class') + '" id=' + searchRowID + ' role="row"></tr>';
        $(SearchRowHtmlString).insertAfter(header);
        for (let i = 0; i < headerCell.length; i++) {
          var SearchCellID = 'search-column-' + tableCount + '-' + i;
          var SearchCellHtmlString = '<td class="column-search-cell"><span class="fa fa-search"></span><input type="text" '
                                   + ' id=' + SearchCellID + ' placeholder=""/></td>';
          $(SearchCellHtmlString).appendTo($('#' + searchRowID));
          $('#' + SearchCellID).keydown(function(e) { // search on key event
            if (e.key === 'Enter') e.preventDefault(); // don't acknowledge 'enter' key
          }).keyup(function() {
            dataTable.columns(i).search(this.value).draw();
          });
        };
      };

      if (enableColumnHide) { // column filter
        // add the column filter dropdown before the table:
        $('<div id="column-list-' + tableCount + '" class="dropdown-check-list"'
          + ' tabindex="100"><span class="anchor">Columns<i class="fa fa-angle-down">'
          + '</i></span><ul class="items"></ul></div>').insertBefore(table);

        table.columnFilter({ // calls function from jquery.columnfilter.js
          columnCheckboxsContainer: '#column-list-' + tableCount + ' > ul',
          localStorageNamespace: 'table.column.' + tableCount + '.'
        });
        dataTable.columns.adjust().draw();
      };
      tableCount++;
    };
  });

  // handle column filter dropdown
  $('.dropdown-check-list').each(function() {
    var checkList = $(this);
    checkList.find('.anchor').click(function (e) {
      checkList.toggleClass('visible');
    });
  });
};
