; (function ($, window, document, undefined) {
    var $win = $(window);
    var $doc = $(document);

    function fixChecks() {
        $('.js-fix-items').each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);
            var isOdd = $this.children().length % 2 ? 1 : 0;
            var $splittedChecks = $this.children().slice(parseInt($this.children().length / 2) + isOdd, $this.find('> li').length);
            var $row;
            var $ul;

            $this.wrap('<div class="row"><div class="col-sm-6"></div></div>');

            $row = $this.closest('.row');

            $row
                .append('<div class="col-sm-6 pull-right" />')
                .find('> .pull-right')
                .append($this.clone());

            $ul = $row.find('> .pull-right > ul');

            $ul
                .children()
                .remove();
            $ul.append($splittedChecks.clone());

            $splittedChecks.remove();
        });
    }

    // Make <img> tags backgrounds
    function fixBG() {
        $('.fix-bg').each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);

            $this.css({
                'backgroundImage': 'url(' + $this.find('.background').attr('src') + ')'
            });
        });
    }

    function checkForDD(ele) {
        ele.each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);

            if ($this.find('li').length) {
                $this.addClass('has-dd').prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
            } else {
                //$this.removeClass().find('.dd-trigger').remove();
            }
        });
    }

    function closePopup() {
        // Close Popup
        $('.link-close').on('click', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            $.magnificPopup.close();
            $('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
            //reset checkboxes
            $(".filterTable input[type='checkbox']").prop('checked', false);
        });
    }

    $doc.ready(function () {

        var q;

        if (window.location.search.indexOf('q=') > 0) {
            if (window.location.search.indexOf('&') > window.location.search.indexOf('q=')) {
                q = window.location.search.substring(window.location.search.indexOf('q='), window.location.search.indexOf('&'));
            } else
                q = window.location.search.substring(window.location.search.indexOf('q='));
        }

        $('#pagination_ajax:not(.non-default)').on('click', '.page-link', function () {
            page = $(this).attr('data-page');
            rpp = $('#show-num').val();
            const url = constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp, q);
            location.assign(url);
        }).on('keyup', '#paging-field', function (e) {
            validatePaginationValue();
            if (e.keyCode === 13) {
                page = $(this).val();
                rpp = $('#show-num').val();
                const url = constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp, q);
                location.assign(url);
            }
        });

        function querySearch(key) {
            key = key.replace(/[*+?^$.\[\]{}()|\\\/]/g, "\\$&"); // escape RegEx meta chars
            let match = location.search.match(new RegExp("[?&]" + key + "=([^&]+)(&|$)"));
            return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, " "));
        }

        function getAllLabels() {
            let allParams = location.search.split('&')
            let labels = '';

            allParams.map(function(param) {
                param.includes('labels=') ? labels += '&' + param : null;
            })

            return labels;
        }

        function constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp) {
            let facetreset = querySearch('facetreset')
            let searchValue = querySearch('q')
            let labels = getAllLabels();
            let pathName = '?page=' + page + '&rpp=' + rpp;

            let disabledUsers = querySearch('s');
            if (disabledUsers == 'on') {
                pathName += '&s=' + disabledUsers;
            }

            if (facetreset) {
                pathName += '&facetreset=yes';
            }
            if (searchValue) {
                pathName += '&q=' + searchValue;
            }
            if (labels !== '') {
                pathName += labels
            }
            return location.pathname + pathName
        }

        function checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue) {
            return !pageValue.match(/[A-Za-z]+/) && parseInt(pageValue) > 0;
        }

        function validatePaginationValue() {
            const pagingInput = $('#paging-field');
            const pageValue = pagingInput.val();
            if (!pageValue) return;
            const maxPossiblePageValue = parseInt(pagingInput.attr('max'));
            checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue)
            if (!checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue)) {
                const tempPageNum = Math.abs(parseInt(pageValue));
                if (tempPageNum > maxPossiblePageValue) {
                    pagingInput.val(maxPossiblePageValue.toString());
                } else {
                    pagingInput.val(tempPageNum.toString() || '1');
                }
            }
            if (parseInt(pagingInput.val()) > maxPossiblePageValue) {
                pagingInput.val(maxPossiblePageValue.toString());
            }
        }

        $('#show-num').change(function () {
            const href = location.pathname;
            const page = $('#paging-field').val().trim();
            var perPage = $('#show-num option:selected').text();

            if (q !== undefined)
                location.assign(href + '?rpp=' + perPage + '&' + q);
            else
                location.assign(href + '?rpp=' + perPage);
        });


        // Split checkboxes into 2 columns
        if ($('.js-fix-items').length) {
            fixChecks();
        }

        // Init Custom Select
        if ($('.select.collections').length) {
            $('.select.collections').dropdown({
                mobile: true
            });
        }

        var msie = window.navigator.userAgent.indexOf('MSIE ');

        $('.widget-body > .list-links > li > ul').addClass('visible');

        $('.widget-body .list-links ul').addClass('list-links');


        //Lightbox Popups
        $('.has-lightbox').magnificPopup({
            type: 'inline',
            callbacks: {
                ajaxContentAddsed: function () {
                    $('.popup').on('click', '.link-close', function (event) {
                        $.magnificPopup.close();
                        $('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
                        event.preventDefault();
                    });
                }
            }
        });

        // Check all in Publication Page Table
        if ($('.check-all').length) {
            var $checkAll = $('.check-all');
            var $targets = $($checkAll.data('target'));

            $checkAll.on('change', function () {
                $targets.prop('checked', this.checked);
            });

            $targets.on('change', function () {
                disableMasterCheck($checkAll, $targets);
            });
        }

        // Publication Page Table AJAX sort
        var isLoading = false;
        $('.table-primary th a').on('click', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();

            if (isLoading) {
                return;
            }

            loading = true;
            var $this = $(this)
            var $tbody = $this.closest('.table-primary').find('tbody');

            $this
                .closest('th')
                .addClass('sorted')
                .siblings()
                .removeClass('sorted');

        });
        // Open Popups
        $('.link-popup').magnificPopup({
            type: 'inline',
            mainClass: 'mfp-fade',
            removalDelay: 400,
            fixedBgPos: false,
            fixedContentPos: false,
            callbacks: {
                open: function () {
                    if ($(window).width() >= 768 && !$(".filterTable input[type='checkbox']").is(':checked') && window.location.href.indexOf('publications') > -1) {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        $.magnificPopup.close();
                        $("html, body").animate({ scrollTop: 0 }, "slow");
                        $('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message message-error active"><p>You must select at least one map you wish to add.</p></div>');
                        $('.message').show();
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            $(".message").fadeOut();
                        }, 3000);
                        $(".message").remove();

                    } else {
                        //positionPopup(this);
                        closePopup();
                    }
                    if ($win.width() < 768) {
                        $('.mfp-container').scrollLock('enable');
                    }
                },
                close: function () {
                    if ($win.width() < 768) {
                        $('.mfp-container').scrollLock('disable');
                    }
                    // Topic Page
                    $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val('');
                    $('#create-popup #default-collection').prop('checked', false);
                    // Announcement Page
                    $('#create-popup #field-name').val('');
                    $('#create-popup #inner-editor').text('');
                    $('#create-popup .form-error p').text('');
                    $('#create-popup #field-default').prop('checked', false);
                    // MyDocs Page
                    $('#field-collection-name').val('');
                    $('#form-add-collection .form-error p').text('');
                    $('.form-add-collection #default-collection').prop('checked', false);
                }
            }
        });

        //Toggle Sidebar
        $('.widget-expand').on('click', function (event) {
            $(this).closest('.sidebar').toggleClass('sidebar-compact');
        });

        //Check for Dropdown
        checkForDD($('.widget .list-links li'));

        $('.widget').on('click', '.dd-trigger', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            $(this).parent().toggleClass('isOpen');
            // Find first <ul> and display it
            $(this).parent().find('ul').toggleClass('visible');
        });

        //Make sortable
        //     $('.list-sortable').nestedSortable({
        //  placeholder: 'placeholder',
        //  forcePlaceholderSize: true,
        //  handle: '> div',
        //  helper: 'clone',
        //  items: 'li',
        //  opacity: .6,
        //  revert: 250,
        //  tabSize: 25,
        //  tolerance: 'pointer',
        //  toleranceElement: '> div',
        //  change: function(event, ui) {
        //      var $target = $(event.target).parent();
        //      var $sender = $(ui.sender).parent();

        //      $('.widget .list-sortable li').each(function() {
        //          var $li = $(this);

        //          if ( $li.find('> ul > li').length ) {
        //              $li.addClass('has-dd').addClass('isOpen').find('> ul').addClass('visible');

        //              if ( !$li.find('> .dd-trigger').length ) {
        //                  $li.prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
        //              };
        //          } else {
        //              $li.removeClass('has-dd');
        //              $li.find('.dd-trigger').remove();
        //              $li.find('> ul').remove();
        //          }
        //      });
        //  }
        // }).disableSelection();

        // Check if <img> tags should be made backgrounds
        if ($('.fix-bg').length) {
            fixBG();
        }

        // Toggle buttons
        $('.toggle').on('click', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            var $toggle = $(this);
            var $target = $toggle.data('target') ? $($toggle.data('target')) : $toggle.data('next') !== undefined ? $toggle.next() : $($toggle.attr('href'));
            var toggleClass = $toggle.data('class') ? $toggle.data('class') : 'active';

            $toggle
                .add($target)
                .toggleClass(toggleClass);
        });
    });
})(jQuery, window, document);

$(document.body).on('click touchstart', '.delComment', function () {
    var input = $(this);
    var delUrl = input.attr("delurl");
    var cont = true;
    $('.main').prepend('<div class="message message-error"><p>Are you sure you want to delete this comment?</p><div class="action-wrapper"><a href="#0" class="confirm-btn">Delete</a><a href="#0" class="link-close">Cancel</a></div></div>');
    $('.message.message-error').show();

    $('.message.message-error .confirm-btn').off().on('click', function (event) {
        if (cont == true) {
            $.ajax({
                url: delUrl,
                type: "DELETE",
                dataType: "json",
                success: function (resp) {
                    console.log(resp);
                    //var numId = "'[link-id=\"" + resp.id + "\"]'";
                    //input.parent().fadeOut();
                    //$(numId).text(resp.text);
                    input.closest('.comment').slideUp();
                    $('.content-comments-head h4').text(resp.text.slice(0, 1) + " COMMENTS FOR THIS TOPIC");

                },
                error: function (resp) {
                    alert("Error Deleting Comment");
                }
            });
        }
        ;
        $('.message.message-error').fadeOut();
    });

    $('.message.message-error .link-close').off().on('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        $('.message.message-error').fadeOut().remove();
    });

});

{
    $(function () {

        $(".search-field-main:first").autocomplete({
            source: getSuggestionsDl,
            appendTo: ".search, .search-compact",
            autoFocus: false,
            minLength: 2,
            select: function (event, ui) {
                // Takes you to the suggested topic title selected
                //window.location = ui.item.url;
                // Takes you to the search results page with the topic title selected
                //$(".search-field:first").val(ui.item.value);
                //$(".search-field:first").closest("form").submit();
            }

        }).data("ui-autocomplete")._renderItem = function (ul, item) {
            //     item.label = item.label.replace(new RegExp("(?![^&;]+;)(?!<[^<>]*)(" + $.ui.autocomplete.escapeRegex(this.term) + ")(?![^<>]*>)(?![^&;]+;)", "gi"), "$1");
            /*-----------------For adding labels tag in suggestions-------------------*\
            \*------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
            return $("<li>")
                .data("ui-autocomplete-item", item)
                .append("<span>" + item.label + "</span>")
                //.append( "<span>" + item.label + "<span class='verT'> ("+item.labels[0]+")</span>" + "</span>" )
                .appendTo(ul);

        }
    });

    function getSuggestionsDl(request, response) {
        var params = $("input:checked[name='labels']").serializeArray();
        var query = { name: "q", value: request.term };
        params.push(query);

        if ($('#pubfield').length) { // If search is limited to a publication limit the suggestions returned by the publication
            var bundle = { name: "bundle", value: $('#pubfield').val() };
            params.push(bundle);
        }
        var params1 = $.param(params);
        $.ajax({
            dataType: "json",
            url: "https://learn-be.jamf.com/search/complete",
            data: params1,
            success: function (data) {
                //console.log(data.suggestions);
                response(data.suggestions);

            }
        });
    };
}

$('.inputfile').change(function () {
    var filename = $('.inputfile').val().split('\\').pop();
    if ($(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').length) {
        if (filename != '') {
            $(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').find('span:first-child').html(filename);
            $(this).parent().addClass('hidden');
        } else {
            $(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').remove();
        }
    }
    else {
        $(this).parent().addClass('hidden');
        $(this).parent().after("<div class='inputfile-name'><span class='title'>FILE</span><div class='file'><div><span class='material-icons-outlined file-icon'>insert_drive_file</span><span>" + filename + "</span></div><span class='material-icons-outlined close-inputfile'>cancel</span></div></div");
        $('.close-inputfile').on('click', function (event) {
            $(this).parent().parent().siblings('.required').find('input').val('');
            $(this).parent().parent().siblings('.required').removeClass('hidden');
            $(this).parent().parent().remove();
            $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', true);
        });
    }
    if ($('.inputfile-name').length == 0 || ($('.inputfile-name').length && $('.inputfile-name')[0].innerHTML == "")) {
        $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', true);
    } else {
        $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', false);
    }
});

var zdocs = zdocs || {};
zdocs.queryString = function (queryStringAsString) {
    var qs = queryStringAsString || window.location.search.substring(1)
    var params = {}, queries, temp, i, l;
    queries = qs.split("&");
    for (i = 0, l = queries.length; i < l; i++) {
        temp = queries[i].split('=');
        params[temp[0]] = temp[1];
    }
    return params;
};

var searchLocations = [
    /\/bundle\/[^\/]+?\/page\/.+/,
    /\/bundle$/,
    /\/search$/,
    /\/admin\/definecontrole$/,
    /\/admin\/contentgroup\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/admin\/managebundles$/,
    /\/admin\/reviewertasks$/,
    /\/admin\/template$/,
    /\/admin\/template\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/admin\/watermark$/,
    /\/admin\/watermark\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/mydocs$/,
    /\/managewatches\/[^\/]+$/
];

$(document).ready(function () {
    var pathname = document.location.pathname;
    var isSearchNeeded = false;
    for (let i = 0; i < searchLocations.length; i++)
        if (pathname.match(searchLocations[i]) !== null) {
            isSearchNeeded = true;
            break;
        }
    if (isSearchNeeded)
        $.ajax({
            url: '/api/search',
            type: "GET",
            dataType: "json",
            success: function (resp) {
                if (resp.relevant_labels) {
                    $('.widget-toc ul.list-links:first li').each(function () {
                        if (($(this).find($('.relevantFacet')).length > 0) || $(this).hasClass('relevantFacet')) {
                            $(this).removeClass('hidden-facet');
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    $('.hidden-facet').removeClass('hidden-facet');
                }
            },
            error: function () {
                $('.hidden-facet').removeClass('hidden-facet');
            }
        });
});

function checkFileUrl(url) {
  return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
    fetch(url).then(
      function(response) {
        if (response.ok) {
          return resolve();
        }
        reject();
      },
      reject
    );
  });
}

    }

    // SubjectSchemeLocalFiles
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/localsubjectscheme") >= 0) {
        $(".SubjectSchemeLocalFiles").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // CategoriesLocalFiles
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/localcategories") >= 0) {
        $(".CategoriesLocalFiles").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ReviewerTasks
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/reviewertasks") >= 0) {
        $(".ReviewerTasks").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ListTemplates
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/listtemplates") >= 0 || window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/template") >= 0) {
        $(".ListTemplates").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // myhowtos
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/myhowtos") >= 0) {
        $(".MyHowtos").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ArticleAdmin
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/articleadmin") >= 0) {
        $(".ArticleAdmin").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // SearchDocuments
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/search") >= 0) {
        $(".SearchDocuments").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // Reportings
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/reportings") >= 0) {
        $(".Reportings").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // afmin-nav filter functionality
    $('#admin-nav-search').on('input', function (event) {
        updateNavLinks(event);
    });

    function updateNavLinks(event) {
        let allLinks = $('.admin-nav a');
        let q = event.target.value.toLowerCase();
        for (var index = 0; index < allLinks.length; ++index) {
            let linkElement = $(allLinks[index]);
            if(linkElement.find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)
                && linkElement.is('[data-target]')) {
                    let amountOfChildrenLinks = $(allLinks[index]).siblings('ul').children().length;
                    for(var j = 1; j <= amountOfChildrenLinks; ++j) {
                        $(allLinks[index + j]).parent().show();
                    }
                index += amountOfChildrenLinks;
            } else if (linkElement.find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)) {
                $(allLinks[index]).parent().show()
            } else if ($(allLinks[index]).is('[data-target]')) {
                let b = $(allLinks[index]).siblings('ul');
                let childVisible = false;
                let childrenLinks = b.children();
                childrenLinks.map(function(index) {
                    if (!childVisible) {
                        childVisible = $(childrenLinks[index]).find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)
                    }
                })
                childVisible ? $(allLinks[index]).parent().show() : $(allLinks[index]).parent().hide()
            } else {
                $(allLinks[index]).parent().hide()
            }
        };

        $('.nav-section').each(function () {
            if ($(this).find('.category-content:visible').length === 0) {
                $(this).find('.admin-title').hide();
            }
            else {
                $(this).find('.admin-title').show();
            }
        })

        let areAllInvisible = true;
        allLinks.map(function(index) {
            $(allLinks[index]).is(":visible") ? areAllInvisible = false : null;
        });

        if (areAllInvisible) {
            $('#no-results .admin-title').removeClass('hidden');
            $('#no-results .admin-title').show()
        }
        else {
            $('#no-results .admin-title').hide();
        }
    };
});

                'mergeTableCells',
                'tableProperties',
                'tableCellProperties'
            ]
        },
        simpleUpload: {
            uploadUrl: uploadUrl || ''
        },
        licenseKey: 'LfYSrcoox/FcsHUwiONc/KjCrOJljNEN0SOCtuL8XP9sCXeU8Fdkav6GpDsCGezZrF4o071h9XmZfA==',
    };

    ClassicEditor
        .create(document.querySelector(targetId),
            editor_configuration
        ).then(function(newEditor) {
            editor = newEditor;
        })

    $('#clearManualDigest').on('click', function (event) {
        editor.setData('');
        $("#datepicker").val('')
    });

    $('#clearTestDigest').on('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        editor.setData('');
        $("#datepicker1").val('')
    });
}

function jobDeleteSession(url) {
  $('#pdfPDFWait').hide();
  return $.ajax({
    url:      url,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
  }).done(function (data) {
    console.log("Delete session: " + data);
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    console.log("Delete session error: " + response.status + " " + textStatus);
  });
}

function notifyByEmail(url) {
  $('#pdfPDFWait').hide();
  return $.ajax({
    url:      url,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
  }).done(function (data) {
    console.log("Delete session: " + data);
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    console.log("Delete session error: " + response.status + " " + textStatus);
  });
}

<div class="subtitle"><span>Jamf Pro Documentation 11.25.0</span>

<div class="content-entry"><article class="hascomments" data-page="bundle:jamf-pro-documentation-11.25.0/enus/Single_Sign-On.html" id="bundle:jamf-pro-documentation-11.25.0/enus/Single_Sign-On.html"><main role="main"><article aria-labelledby="ariaid-title1" class="dita" id="ID-00006584" role="article"><h1 class="title topictitle1" id="ariaid-title1">Single Sign-On (SSO)</h1><div class="body conbody"><p class="p">The single sign-on (SSO) options available differ for administrators and end users, and depend on whether you have a modern cloud identity provider (IdP) available in your environment.</p><dl class="dl"><dt class="dt dlterm">OIDC-Based SSO in <span class="ph">Jamf Account</span></dt><dd class="dd"><p class="p"><span class="ph">Jamf's</span> platform approach to SSO, powered by a protocol called OIDC (OpenID Connect) is required to access certain <span class="ph">Jamf</span> platform capabilities and services, such as blueprints.</p><div class="p">An administrator can use either of the following options for streamlined login across the platform:<ul class="dl inline"><li class="dlentry"><span class="dt dlterm">OIDC Identity Provider (IdP)</span><span>—</span><span class="dd">For organizations using a modern cloud IdP (e.g., Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, or Google Identity).</span></li><li class="dlentry"><span class="dt dlterm">Jamf ID</span><span>—</span><span class="dd"><p class="p">For organizations not using an IdP, <span class="ph">Jamf ID</span> is available as an SSO option.</p></span></li></ul></div><p class="p">For more information, see <a class="xref" href="Jamf_SSO.html#concept-d8dm1gkg">SSO with OIDC Through Jamf Account</a>.</p></dd><dt class="dt dlterm">SAML-Based SSO</dt><dd class="dd"><p class="p">For end users, you can integrate with an IdP to enable SAML-based SSO for Automated Device Enrollment (with an Enrollment Customization SSO authentication pane), Device Enrollment (also known as "user-initiated enrollment"), and <span class="ph">Jamf</span> Self Service for macOS. This option can also be used to require administrators to authenticate when accessing the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> server. For more information, see <a class="xref" href="SAML-Based_Single_Sign-On.html#ID-h34uher0">SSO with SAML</a>.</p><p class="p">For administrators with supported environments, OIDC-based SSO for the <span class="ph">Jamf Pro</span> server is recommended to ensure full compatibility with upcoming Jamf platform capabilities and services.</p></dd></dl></div><nav role="navigation"><ul class="ullinks"><li class="link ulchildlink"><strong><a href="Jamf_SSO.html#concept-d8dm1gkg">SSO with OIDC Through Jamf Account</a></strong><br /></li><li class="link ulchildlink"><strong><a href="SAML-Based_Single_Sign-On.html#ID-h34uher0">SSO with SAML</a></strong><br /></li></ul></nav><nav class="related-links" role="navigation"><div class="linklist relinfo"><strong></strong><ul class="linklist"><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Single_Sign-On_Options_for_Jamf_Pro_FAQ.html" target="_blank">Single Sign-On Options for Jamf Pro FAQ</a></li><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Understanding_SSO_Authentication_Methods_for_Jamf_Platform_Services.html" target="_blank">Understanding SSO Authentication Methods for Jamf Platform Services</a></li><li class="linklist"><a class="link" href="https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Transitioning_Jamf_Pro_from_SAML-Based_SSO_to_OIDC-Based_SSO_through_Jamf_Account.html" target="_blank">Transitioning Jamf Pro SSO for Administrators from SAML-Based SSO to OIDC-Based SSO in Jamf Account</a></li></ul></div></nav></article></main></article>
</div>

<script>var msgDone            = "Your PDF job is done.";
var msgQueue           = "Your PDF job is still in queue.";
var msgProgres         = "Your PDF job is in progress. It will soon be ready.";
var msgFailed          = "Your PDF job failed. Please restart it.";
var msgPreprocess      = "We're preprocessing your PDF job. Please wait.";
var msgPdfNotAvailable = "PDF generation services are currently not available.";
function jobStatus(url,isRecheck) {var random       = Math.random();
var refreshDelay = (5 + random) * 1000;
$.ajax({url:      url,
dataType: 'json',
cache: false,
type:     'GET',}).done(function (job) {switch(job.status) {case "JobReserved":pdfInformUser(msgPreprocess);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobDone":console.log("DONE time: "  + new Date($.now()) + " >> Next check in: " + refreshDelay + " ms");
console.log("DONE dwnl: "  + job.isDownloaded);
console.log("DONE toke: "  + job.token);
console.log("DONE titl: "  + job.title);if (job.isDownloaded) {console.log("*** Other tab downloaded it *** >> " + job.token);$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
} else {if (isRecheck) {console.log("*** DOWNLOADING *** >> " + job.token);pdfInformUser(msgDone);
window.location.href=job.downloadUrl;
} else {console.log("*** Should download, checking again after 1 sec  *** >> " + job.token);$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,true);}, 1000);
}
}
$('#pdfMessageDiv').hide();
$('.message').fadeOut();
break;
case "JobInQueue":pdfInformUser(msgQueue);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobInProgress":pdfInformUser(msgProgres);
setTimeout(function() {jobStatus(url,isRecheck);}, refreshDelay);
break;case "JobPdfNotAvailable":pdfInformUser(msgPdfNotAvailable);case "JobFailed":
default:pdfInformUser(msgFailed);}
}).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {console.log("textStatus: "  + textStatus);
console.log("errorThrown: " + errorThrown);
console.log("status: "      + response.status);});}
function pdfInformUser(msg) {$('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message">'+ msg +'</div>');
$('#pdfMessageDiv').html("<div>" + msg + "</div>");
$('#pdfMessageDiv').show();}</script>

// no-cache
// *************************************************************************************
// Data supplied by backend on every page load
// *************************************************************************************
// Interpolation vars available to templates
// - Permissions:
//     canDelete favCRUD
//     canRead   favCRUD
//     canUpdate favCRUD
//     canCreate favCRUD
// - Action URLs
//   - favArticleUrl
//   - favCollUrl
//   - favCollAddUrl
//   - favTopicUrl
//   - favTopicInfoUrl
//   - favMoveUrl
// - Initial values
//   - favCollections as HTML
//   - favDefCollTopics as HTML
//   - favFavCollTopics as HTML
//   - favCollWidget as widget
//   - favShareCollections as HTML
//   - favShareDefCollTopics as HTML
//   - favFavouritesCollId as Int

// - PDF related:
//   - favPdfGetUrl
//   - favPdfTitleUrl
//   - favPdfAutoToc
//   - favPdfSuggest
//   - favPdfShowDlg
//   - favPdfDefTitle
// - Automatic article opening
//   - favAutoCollId
//   - favAutoArtContent

var userCollections     = null;
var defCollItems        = null;
var favCollItems        = null;
var favAutoCollId       = null;
var favPdfAutoToc       = false;
var favAutoArtContent   = null;
var favFavouritesCollId = null;
var favCanDelete        = false;
var favCanRead          = false;
var favCanUpdate        = false;
var favCanCreate        = false;

var message ="";

if (userCollections     == undefined) { userCollections     = [];    }
if (defCollItems        == undefined) { defCollItems        = [];    }
if (favCollItems        == undefined) { favCollItems        = [];    }
if (favAutoCollId       == undefined) { favAutoCollId       = 0;     }
if (favAutoArtContent   == undefined) { favAutoArtContent   = "";    }
if (favFavouritesCollId == undefined) { favFavouritesCollId = 0;     }
if (favCanDelete        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanRead          == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanUpdate        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }
if (favCanCreate        == undefined) { favCanDelete        = false; }

// *************************************************************************************
// Ajax functions for communication with backend.
// Each function supplies a '.fail' function which displays a dialog box
// *************************************************************************************

// Get all Collections for the User
// Request:
// JSON: { "crWithCounts":   Bool
//       , "crSortBy":       "CSAlpha" or "CSCount"
//       , "crFilter":       Text // not used yet
//       , "crPage":         Int
//       , "crItemsPerPage": Int
//       , "crHtmlOnly":     Bool
//       }
// Responses: code - 200 (OK)
// JSON: [{ "count": Int
//          "isShared": Bool
//          "collection": { "id":          Int
//                        , "title":       Text
//                        , "isDefault":   Bool
//                        , "isFavourite": Bool
//                        , "stateHash":   Text
//                        }
//       }]
//  or  {"html": Text}
function getAllCollectionsAjax(withCounts, sortBy, page, perPage, htmlOnly) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:      'https://learn-be.jamf.com/api/mydocs/collections',
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
    data:      JSON.stringify({ "crWithCounts":   withCounts
                              , "crSortBy":       sortBy
                              , "crFilter":       ""
                              , "crPage":         page
                              , "crItemsPerPage": perPage
                              , "crHtmlOnly":     htmlOnly
                              })
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
       switch (response.status){
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    $('#rename-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

// Create new Collection
// Responses:
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed
//   code - 409 (Conflict)          - Collection already exists
//   code - 201 (Created)
//          header 'Location'  = full link to new Collection
//          header 'NewId'     = Collection's new ID
//   JSON: {"html": widget for collection}
function addCollectionAjax(collName) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null + collName,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'PUT'
  }).done(function(){
      $.magnificPopup.close();
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    switch (response.status){
        case 409:
            message = 'A collection with the name "'+collName+ '" already exists.\r\n'+
            'Please enter a new collection name to proceed.';
            break;
        case 400:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed";
            break;
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - No collection name ";
    }
    //console.log('message', message);
    $('#create-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
    $('#create-popup .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

// Rename collection
// Request: JSON {"cpNewName": [newName,currtopics Count]}
// Responses:
//   code - 404 (Not Found)
//   code - 200 (OK)
//    JSON: { "rename": Bool -- success or not
//          , "html": widget for collection with new name}
function renameCollectionAjax(collId, newName, currCount){
  return $.ajax({
    url:      null + collId,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
    data:      JSON.stringify({ "cpNewName": [newName,currCount]})
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    //console.log('response.status', response.status);
    switch (response.status){
        case 409:
            message = "Bad action: "+response.status+" Collection name already exists";
            break;
        case 400:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed";
            break;
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    $('#rename-collection .form-error > p').text(message);
  });
};

};

// Return article for the topic

//       , "addedOn":       Text
//       , "rating":        Text
//       , "views":         Text
//       , "watched"        If user allowed watching - Bool, if not - field not present

//       And depending on the type, only one of the following:

//         , "resource"     URL

//       And depending on whether available, zero or more of the following:

//       }
function getArticleAjax(collId, content) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null + collId + "/" + content,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
     success: function(){
    //console.log(null + collId + "/" + content);
    }
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
       switch (response.status){
        case 403:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Not allowed ";
            // alert("Not allowed");
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    $('#delete-topic .form-error > p').text(message);

  });
};


// Get suggested title for selected (or all) topics for PDF generation
// Param 'topics' is a pair (topic,Bool). Boole signifies if children should be included
// Responses:
//   code - 200 (Created) JSON: {"title": Text}
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - Insert failed
//   code - 404 (Not Found)         - Page not found
function pdfSuggestTitleAjax(collId, topics) {
  return $.ajax({
    url:       null,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
    data:      JSON.stringify({
       "fpCollId": collId
     , "fpTopics": topics
     , "fpTitle":  ""
     , "fpToC":    false
     // , "fpCustom": "" // must be ommited because it is a Maybe
     , "fpHasMany": false // just to fill record, not used
    })
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    switch (response.status){
        case 404:
            mesaage = "Bad Action" + response.status + " Invalid arguments - Insert failed";
        case 404:
            message = "Bad action: " + response.status + " Collection not found ";
    }
    //console.log('Error message: ', message);

  });
};

// Generate PDF for selected (or all) topics
// Param 'topics' is a pair (topic,Bool). Boole signifies if children should be included
// Responses:
//   code - 200 (Created) JSON: {"url": Text}
//   code - 400 (Invalid Arguments) - JSON not formed properly
//   code - 404 (Not Found)         - Collection not found
function pdfGeneratePOST(collId,topics,title,toc,content,custom,hasMany) {
  var jsonData = JSON.stringify({ "fpCollId": collId
                                , "fpTopics": topics
                                , "fpTitle":  title
                                , "fpToC":    toc
                                , "fpCustom": custom
                                , "fpHasMany": hasMany
                                });
  //console.log(jsonData);
  var form = $('<form method="POST" action="' + null + '">');
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='pdfData' value='" + jsonData +        "'>"));
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='content' value='" + content +         "'>"));
  form.append($("<input type='hidden' name='url'     value='" + window.location
                                                              + "#"
                                                              + custom + "'>"));
  $('body').append(form);
  form.submit();
  form.hide();
};



// Function called on Ajax fail
// confirmation popup
// gets a string to display in the popup
// popup's up a message to user.
function popupConfirmation(message){
  $("#confirm p.right").text(message);
  $("#confirm").removeClass('hidden');
  $("#confirm").dialog({
     dialogClass: "no-close",
     resizable: false,
     height: "auto",
     width: 400,
     modal: true,
     buttons: {
       "Close": function() {
          $( this ).dialog( "close" );
        }
     }
  });
};

// onClick action for elements that add Bundle to MyDocs.
// Must have attribute "slug" and attribute "collId"
$(".addBundleToMyDocs").click(function() {
  var elem      = $("#ajaxMessage")
  var slug      = $( this ).attr('slug');
  var collId    = $( this ).attr('collId');
  var custTitle = $( this ).attr('custTitle');

  elem.html("Bundle is being added to your MyDocs. You will be notified when the process is finished.");
  autoHideAfter(elem,5);
  $ajax = addBundleAjax(1, [slug], custTitle);
  $ajax.done(function (data) {
    elem.html("Bundle has been added to your MyDocs.");
    autoHideAfter(elem,5);
  });
});

// Show element and hide it after specified seconds
function autoHideAfter(elem,secs) {
  elem.show();
  setTimeout(function(){$(elem).hide();}, secs * 1000);
}

/*------------Close Ann and Redirect-------------*/
function dismissAndRedirect(annUrl,nextUrl,elem) {
  if (nextUrl) {
    $(elem).hide();
    $.ajax({
      url:      annUrl,
      dataType: 'json',
      type:     'PUT',
      data:     JSON.stringify({ "annPatchDismiss": true})
    }).done(function (data) {
      window.location.href = nextUrl;
    }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
      console.error("Can't delete Announcement: " + response.responseText + "  ~~  " + errorThrown);
    });
  }
};
$(function(){
    $('.custom-checkbox').on('click', function() {
        if ($(this).find('input').prop('checked')) {
            !$(this).find('input').prop('checked', false);
        }
        else {
            !$(this).find('input').prop('checked', true)
        }

    });


    /* Fix buggy iPad label behavior: http://v4.thewatchmakerproject.com/blog/how-to-fix-the-broken-ipad-form-label-click-issue/ */
    if (navigator.userAgent.match(/iPhone/i) || navigator.userAgent.match(/iPod/i) || navigator.userAgent.match(/iPad/i)) {
        $('label[for]').click(function () {
            var el = $(this).attr('for');
            if ($('#' + el + '[type=radio], #' + el + '[type=checkbox]').attr('selected', !$('#' + el).attr('selected'))) {
                return;
            } else {
                $('#' + el)[0].focus();
            }
        });
    }
    $(".labels li").has("ul").addClass("open_arrow");
    $(".labels li ul li").has("ul").addClass("closed");

    //open checked checkbox's ancestors so the check is visible
    //$(".list-links li input").filter(":checked").parents('li.has-dd').addClass('isOpen');
    //$(".list-links li input").filter(":checked").siblings('ul.list-links').addClass('visible').parents('ul.list-links').addClass('visible');

   // Set up open/close for the containers
    $("li.label").has("ul").click(function(event){
        if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
        $(this).toggleClass("closed");
    });

    $("searcharea li.container").click(function(event){
        if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
        $(this).toggleClass("closed");
    });

    var filterChangedHelper = function(x){
        try {
            onFilterChanged(x);
        }
        catch(e) {
        }
    }

    // Checking/unchecking the group boxes affects the labels
    $("input.inputcheckbox").change(function(){
        var $gbox = $(this);
        var total = 0, checked = 0;
        $.each($gbox.parent().find("input.inputcheckbox"), function(_i, l){
            ++total;
            if ($(l).is(":checked")) ++checked;
        });

      //auto check/uncheck if all descendants are in the same state as the clicked box
        if ($gbox.is(":checked") && checked == 1) {
            $gbox.parent().find("li:not(.hidden-facet) input.inputcheckbox").prop("checked", true);
        }
        else if (! $gbox.is(":checked") && total == checked+1){
            $gbox.parent().find("input.inputcheckbox").prop("checked", false);
        }

        // Open 2nd 3rd level filters if checked facets
        $('.inputcheckbox').each(function(){
            if ( $(this).is(':checked') ){
                $(this).siblings('.toggle').addClass('active');
                $(this).siblings('.zDocsSideFilter > ul').addClass('active');
            }
        });

      filterChangedHelper(this);
    });

    $(".labels li").not(".open_arrow").addClass("less_padding");
});

var isFilterOpen = false;

function clickAdvanced () {
    $("#advanced").toggle();
    $("a.advancedlink").toggleClass("open");
    isFilterOpen = ! isFilterOpen;
    if (isFilterOpen) {
	$("#filteropen").attr("value", "yes");
    } else {
	$("#filteropen").attr("value", "no");
    }
    return false;
}

$(function(){

    $('.link-popup').on('click', function() {
      if( $(this).parent('li').hasClass('bundle') ) {
        // $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').removeAttr("id");
        $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').addClass('addBundleToMyDocs');
      } else {
        $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').removeClass('addBundleToMyDocs');
        // $('.popup').find('input[type="submit"]').attr("id", "add");
      }

    });

    // Initialize Collections In Dropdown
    for (var i=0; i< userCollections.length; i++)
    {
      if (userCollections.length === 1 && userCollections[0].count === 0)
      {
        $('#field-collection').append('<option value="' + userCollections[i].collId +'" '+ (userCollections[i].coll.isDefault ? "" : "")+'>'
				+ userCollections[i].coll.title+'</option>');
	      $('#field-collection option[value='+ userCollections[i].collId+']').prop('selected', false);
      }
      else {
          $('#field-collection').append('<option value="' + userCollections[i].collId +'" '+ (userCollections[i].coll.isDefault ? "class='default'" : "")+'>'
          + userCollections[i].coll.title+'</option>');
          $('#field-collection option[value='+ userCollections[i].collId+']').prop('selected', true);
          //$('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
          }
    }

    // Add collection creation option only if user has create permissions
    if (favCanCreate) {
      if (userCollections.length === 1 && userCollections[0].count === 0) {
        $('#field-collection').prepend('<option class="new-collection">-- New Collection --</option>');
        $('#field-collection .new-collection').prop('selected', true);
      } else {
        $('#field-collection').append('<option class="new-collection">-- New Collection --</option>');
        $('#field-collection option.new-collection').prop('selected', false);
      }
    }

    //collection change event. when user chnges the value in dropdown.
    $('#field-collection').on('change',function(){
        //get selected collection name
      var collection_name = $('#field-collection option[selected=true]').val();
        //console.log('collection_name: ', collection_name);
        //console.log('collection_name: ',  $('#field-collection option[selected=true]').attr('value'));

        //if create collection has been selected start create collection process:
        // 1. create the new collection
        // 2. add current topic to newly created collection.
        if ($(this).val() == '-- New Collection --')
        {
            initPopup( '#create-popup', '' );
            var ua = window.navigator.userAgent;
            var msie = ua.indexOf("MSIE ");
            if (msie > 0 || !!navigator.userAgent.match(/Trident.*rv\:11\./)) {
                return false;
            } else $('#field-collection-name').focus();
        }
        else{
          $('#field-collection option.new-collection').prop('selected', false);
        }
    });

    // Add to Collection Click Event
    // Asaf: I replaced class=add-topic with id=add
    $('#add').on('click', function(event){
      if ($('.fs-dropdown-item_selected').attr('data-value') != '-- New Collection --')
      {
        //console.log(" $('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value')", $('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value'));
        //console.log("val",$('#field-collection option:selected').attr('value'));
        var $ajax = doesTopicExistAjax($('.fs-dropdown-item.fs-dropdown-item_selected').attr('data-value'), $('article[data-page]').attr('data-page'));
        $ajax.done(function (data) {
            $('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message message-error"><p>This topic (or map) has already been added to that collection.</p><div class="action-wrapper"><a href="#0" class="confirm-btn">Continue</a><a href="#0" class="link-close">Cancel</a></div></div>');
            $('.message.message-error').show();

              $('.message.message-error .confirm-btn').off().on('click', function(event){
                  event.preventDefault();
                  setTimeout(function() { $(".message").fadeOut(); }, 3000);
                  $(".message").remove();

                  addTopicToCollection();
              });

              $('.message.message-error .link-close').off().on('click', function(event){
                  event.preventDefault();
                  setTimeout(function() { $(".message").fadeOut(); }, 3000);
                  $(".message").remove();
              });
        });
        $ajax.fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
            if (response.status === 404)
            {
                addTopicToCollection();
            }

        });

        // $('.section-contents .section-content').css('opacity', '1');
        //To close the dropdown after successfully adding to an existing collection
        $('.link-close').trigger('click');
        $('#field-collection option.default').attr('selected', true);
       }
       else{
        //To open the create new collection popup
        console.log('create popup');
        initPopup( '#create-popup', '' );
      }
    });

    $('.list-actions .has-dropdown > ul').on('click', function(event) {
	   event.stopPropagation();
	});


    //------------Load the toc-------------------
    $.getJSON( tocUrl, function( response ) {
         // Each sub-TOC
         $.each(response, function (key, value){
             $('#'+key).append(value);
             $('#'+key).children('.tocLoader').remove();
         });

        // TOC Second Level+
        $("li li.navcontainer").click(function(event){
             if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
             $(this).toggleClass("closed");
         });

         $('.widget .list-links li').each(function() {
             var $li = $(this);

             if ( $li.find(' ul > li').length ) {
                 $li.addClass('has-dd').addClass('isOpen').find('> ul').addClass('visible');

                 if ( !$li.find('> .dd-trigger').length ) {
                     $li.prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
                 };
             } else {
                 $li.removeClass('has-dd').removeClass('isOpen');
                 $li.find('.dd-trigger').remove();
                 $li.find('> ul').remove();
             }
         });

          // Open toc at current location
          $('li a.current').parents('li').addClass('isOpen');
          $('li a.current').parents('ul').addClass('visible');

        /*----------------Previous and Next Buttons-----------------*\
        \*----------------------------------------------------------*/
        if( $(".list-links a.current").length )
        var getID = $(".list-links a.current").closest('li[id^="nav"]').attr('id').split('-')[1];
        if( (getID==1) && (getID != undefined) ){
          $("a.previous").addClass('disabled');
        }

        if ( !($(".list-links a.current").closest('li.toc').next('li.toc').length) ) {
          $("a.next").addClass('disabled');
        }

         //Expand TOC
         $(".link-expand").click(function(event){
              event.preventDefault();
              $('.widget .has-dd').addClass('isOpen');
              $('.widget  .list-links').addClass('visible');
            });

         // Collapse TOC
         $(".link-collapse").click(function(event){
              event.preventDefault();
              $('.widget  .has-dd').removeClass('isOpen');
              $('.widget  .list-links').removeClass('visible');
            });

    }).fail(function() { /*TBD*/ });

    //first toc level
    $("li.navcontainer").click(function(event){
             if (event.target.id != this.id) return;
             $(this).toggleClass("closed");
         });
});

function findEmbeddedSwaggerSpecFilename() {
  const swaggerSpecPlaceholder = document.querySelector('#swagger-spec[data-href]');
    if (swaggerSpecPlaceholder) {
      return swaggerSpecPlaceholder.getAttribute('data-href');
    }
    return undefined;
}

function renderSwagger() {
  const swaggerContainer = document.getElementById('swagger-spec').outerHTML;
  $('article').html(swaggerContainer);
  const configFileName = findEmbeddedSwaggerSpecFilename();
  const dom_id = 'swagger-spec';
  const domNode = document.getElementById('swagger-spec');
  const url = location.href.substring(0, location.href.indexOf('/page/')) + '/page/' + configFileName;

  setTimeout(function() {
    SwaggerUIBundle({
       dom_id, domNode, url
    });
  });
}

      $('#create-popup .create-new').off().on( "click", function(event) {
        event.preventDefault();

        if ($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length > 0  && $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length < 41)
        {
            if(/^[a-zA-Z0-9- ]*$/.test($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val()) == false) {
                $('#create-popup .form-error > p').text("Please use alphabetic and numeric characters only.");
            }
            else {
             $ajax = createNewCollection($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val());
             $ajax.done(function(){
                var set_default = $('#default-collection').is(':checked');

                if (set_default){
                     setTimeout(function(){

                     var collection = $('#field-collection option:contains("'+$('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val()+'")');
                     var collection_id = collection.attr('value');

                     //console.log('collection',collection);
                     //console.log('collection_id', collection_id);
                        $ajax = setDefaultCollectionAjax(collection_id);
                    }, 1000);
                }

                if (favCanUpdate){
                    console.log('if favCanUpdate');
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        addTopicToCollection();
                    }, 1000);
                }

             });

                //console.log('create endded successfully.');
             };
        }
        else if ($('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val().length === 0)
        {
            $(this).closest('#create-popup').find(' .form-error > p').text('You must specify a collection name.');
            $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').css('border', '2pt solid #CE1126');
        }
        else
        {
            $(this).closest('#create-popup').find(' .form-error > p').text('Collection name must contain up to 40 characters .');
            $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').css('border', '2pt solid #CE1126');
        }
      });
    };

			if( $('.popup-onload').length ) {
				var id = '#' + $('.popup').attr('id');

				// Open Popup
				openPopup(id);

		// Popup populate and display function

			$('.popup' + id).find('.popup-body p').text( msg );

    };

  // Change Tags Layout
  function splitTags(obj){
        var tags = $(obj).text();
        var tags_array = tags.split(';');
        var new_tags_string = "";

      for (var i = 0; i< tags_array.length; i++) {
        var current_tags = tags_array[i].replace(/>/g, " | ");
        for (var j=0; j< current_tags.length; j++) {
          new_tags_string += current_tags[j];
        }
        if ((i+1)<tags_array.length){
          new_tags_string+= " | ";
        }
      }
      $(obj).text(new_tags_string);
  };

  splitTags($('.labels'));

// ***** DOC TABLE FEATURES: *****
function zDocsTables() {
  var tableCount = 1; // used to identify each table
  $('article table').each(function() {
    var table = $(this);
    var isSmartTable = table.hasClass('smart');
    var numberOfRowsInTable = table.find('tr').length;
    if (isSmartTable ||
        applySmartTablesForRowsGreaterThan === 0 ||
        applySmartTablesForRowsGreaterThan >= numberOfRowsInTable) {
      var header = table.find('tr:eq(0)');
      var headerCell = header.find('> *');
      table.addClass('data-table-' + tableCount);

      // dataTable functionality
      var dataTable = table.DataTable({ // calls function from datatables.js
        paging: false,
        info: false,
        autoWidth: true,
        ordering: enableTableSort
      });

      if (enableTableFilter) { // column search
        // add search boxes to each column
        var searchRowID = 'search-row-' + tableCount;
        var SearchRowHtmlString = '<tr class="' + header.attr('class') + '" id=' + searchRowID + ' role="row"></tr>';
        $(SearchRowHtmlString).insertAfter(header);
        for (let i = 0; i < headerCell.length; i++) {
          var SearchCellID = 'search-column-' + tableCount + '-' + i;
          var SearchCellHtmlString = '<td class="column-search-cell"><span class="fa fa-search"></span><input type="text" '
                                   + ' id=' + SearchCellID + ' placeholder=""/></td>';
          $(SearchCellHtmlString).appendTo($('#' + searchRowID));
          $('#' + SearchCellID).keydown(function(e) { // search on key event
            if (e.key === 'Enter') e.preventDefault(); // don't acknowledge 'enter' key
          }).keyup(function() {
            dataTable.columns(i).search(this.value).draw();
          });
        };
      };

      if (enableColumnHide) { // column filter
        // add the column filter dropdown before the table:
        $('<div id="column-list-' + tableCount + '" class="dropdown-check-list"'
          + ' tabindex="100"><span class="anchor">Columns<i class="fa fa-angle-down">'
          + '</i></span><ul class="items"></ul></div>').insertBefore(table);

        table.columnFilter({ // calls function from jquery.columnfilter.js
          columnCheckboxsContainer: '#column-list-' + tableCount + ' > ul',
          localStorageNamespace: 'table.column.' + tableCount + '.'
        });
        dataTable.columns.adjust().draw();
      };
      tableCount++;
    };
  });

  // handle column filter dropdown
  $('.dropdown-check-list').each(function() {
    var checkList = $(this);
    checkList.find('.anchor').click(function (e) {
      checkList.toggleClass('visible');
    });
  });
};

; (function ($, window, document, undefined) {
    var $win = $(window);
    var $doc = $(document);

    function fixChecks() {
        $('.js-fix-items').each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);
            var isOdd = $this.children().length % 2 ? 1 : 0;
            var $splittedChecks = $this.children().slice(parseInt($this.children().length / 2) + isOdd, $this.find('> li').length);
            var $row;
            var $ul;

            $this.wrap('<div class="row"><div class="col-sm-6"></div></div>');

            $row = $this.closest('.row');

            $row
                .append('<div class="col-sm-6 pull-right" />')
                .find('> .pull-right')
                .append($this.clone());

            $ul = $row.find('> .pull-right > ul');

            $ul
                .children()
                .remove();
            $ul.append($splittedChecks.clone());

            $splittedChecks.remove();
        });
    }

    // Make <img> tags backgrounds
    function fixBG() {
        $('.fix-bg').each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);

            $this.css({
                'backgroundImage': 'url(' + $this.find('.background').attr('src') + ')'
            });
        });
    }

    function checkForDD(ele) {
        ele.each(function () {
            var $this = $(this);

            if ($this.find('li').length) {
                $this.addClass('has-dd').prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
            } else {
                //$this.removeClass().find('.dd-trigger').remove();
            }
        });
    }

    function closePopup() {
        // Close Popup
        $('.link-close').on('click', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            $.magnificPopup.close();
            $('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
            //reset checkboxes
            $(".filterTable input[type='checkbox']").prop('checked', false);
        });
    }

    $doc.ready(function () {

        var q;

        if (window.location.search.indexOf('q=') > 0) {
            if (window.location.search.indexOf('&') > window.location.search.indexOf('q=')) {
                q = window.location.search.substring(window.location.search.indexOf('q='), window.location.search.indexOf('&'));
            } else
                q = window.location.search.substring(window.location.search.indexOf('q='));
        }

        $('#pagination_ajax:not(.non-default)').on('click', '.page-link', function () {
            page = $(this).attr('data-page');
            rpp = $('#show-num').val();
            const url = constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp, q);
            location.assign(url);
        }).on('keyup', '#paging-field', function (e) {
            validatePaginationValue();
            if (e.keyCode === 13) {
                page = $(this).val();
                rpp = $('#show-num').val();
                const url = constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp, q);
                location.assign(url);
            }
        });

        function querySearch(key) {
            key = key.replace(/[*+?^$.\[\]{}()|\\\/]/g, "\\$&"); // escape RegEx meta chars
            let match = location.search.match(new RegExp("[?&]" + key + "=([^&]+)(&|$)"));
            return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, " "));
        }

        function getAllLabels() {
            let allParams = location.search.split('&')
            let labels = '';

            allParams.map(function(param) {
                param.includes('labels=') ? labels += '&' + param : null;
            })

            return labels;
        }

        function constructPaginationUrl(page, rpp) {
            let facetreset = querySearch('facetreset')
            let searchValue = querySearch('q')
            let labels = getAllLabels();
            let pathName = '?page=' + page + '&rpp=' + rpp;

            let disabledUsers = querySearch('s');
            if (disabledUsers == 'on') {
                pathName += '&s=' + disabledUsers;
            }

            if (facetreset) {
                pathName += '&facetreset=yes';
            }
            if (searchValue) {
                pathName += '&q=' + searchValue;
            }
            if (labels !== '') {
                pathName += labels
            }
            return location.pathname + pathName
        }

        function checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue) {
            return !pageValue.match(/[A-Za-z]+/) && parseInt(pageValue) > 0;
        }

        function validatePaginationValue() {
            const pagingInput = $('#paging-field');
            const pageValue = pagingInput.val();
            if (!pageValue) return;
            const maxPossiblePageValue = parseInt(pagingInput.attr('max'));
            checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue)
            if (!checkPageValueIsValidNumber(pageValue)) {
                const tempPageNum = Math.abs(parseInt(pageValue));
                if (tempPageNum > maxPossiblePageValue) {
                    pagingInput.val(maxPossiblePageValue.toString());
                } else {
                    pagingInput.val(tempPageNum.toString() || '1');
                }
            }
            if (parseInt(pagingInput.val()) > maxPossiblePageValue) {
                pagingInput.val(maxPossiblePageValue.toString());
            }
        }

        $('#show-num').change(function () {
            const href = location.pathname;
            const page = $('#paging-field').val().trim();
            var perPage = $('#show-num option:selected').text();

            if (q !== undefined)
                location.assign(href + '?rpp=' + perPage + '&' + q);
            else
                location.assign(href + '?rpp=' + perPage);
        });


        // Split checkboxes into 2 columns
        if ($('.js-fix-items').length) {
            fixChecks();
        }

        // Init Custom Select
        if ($('.select.collections').length) {
            $('.select.collections').dropdown({
                mobile: true
            });
        }

        var msie = window.navigator.userAgent.indexOf('MSIE ');

        $('.widget-body > .list-links > li > ul').addClass('visible');

        $('.widget-body .list-links ul').addClass('list-links');


        //Lightbox Popups
        $('.has-lightbox').magnificPopup({
            type: 'inline',
            callbacks: {
                ajaxContentAddsed: function () {
                    $('.popup').on('click', '.link-close', function (event) {
                        $.magnificPopup.close();
                        $('#field-collection option.default').prop('selected', true);
                        event.preventDefault();
                    });
                }
            }
        });

        // Check all in Publication Page Table
        if ($('.check-all').length) {
            var $checkAll = $('.check-all');
            var $targets = $($checkAll.data('target'));

            $checkAll.on('change', function () {
                $targets.prop('checked', this.checked);
            });

            $targets.on('change', function () {
                disableMasterCheck($checkAll, $targets);
            });
        }

        // Publication Page Table AJAX sort
        var isLoading = false;
        $('.table-primary th a').on('click', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();

            if (isLoading) {
                return;
            }

            loading = true;
            var $this = $(this)
            var $tbody = $this.closest('.table-primary').find('tbody');

            $this
                .closest('th')
                .addClass('sorted')
                .siblings()
                .removeClass('sorted');

        });
        // Open Popups
        $('.link-popup').magnificPopup({
            type: 'inline',
            mainClass: 'mfp-fade',
            removalDelay: 400,
            fixedBgPos: false,
            fixedContentPos: false,
            callbacks: {
                open: function () {
                    if ($(window).width() >= 768 && !$(".filterTable input[type='checkbox']").is(':checked') && window.location.href.indexOf('publications') > -1) {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        $.magnificPopup.close();
                        $("html, body").animate({ scrollTop: 0 }, "slow");
                        $('.wrapper').prepend('<div class="message message-error active"><p>You must select at least one map you wish to add.</p></div>');
                        $('.message').show();
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            $(".message").fadeOut();
                        }, 3000);
                        $(".message").remove();

                    } else {
                        //positionPopup(this);
                        closePopup();
                    }
                    if ($win.width() < 768) {
                        $('.mfp-container').scrollLock('enable');
                    }
                },
                close: function () {
                    if ($win.width() < 768) {
                        $('.mfp-container').scrollLock('disable');
                    }
                    // Topic Page
                    $('#create-popup #field-collection-name').val('');
                    $('#create-popup #default-collection').prop('checked', false);
                    // Announcement Page
                    $('#create-popup #field-name').val('');
                    $('#create-popup #inner-editor').text('');
                    $('#create-popup .form-error p').text('');
                    $('#create-popup #field-default').prop('checked', false);
                    // MyDocs Page
                    $('#field-collection-name').val('');
                    $('#form-add-collection .form-error p').text('');
                    $('.form-add-collection #default-collection').prop('checked', false);
                }
            }
        });

        //Toggle Sidebar
        $('.widget-expand').on('click', function (event) {
            $(this).closest('.sidebar').toggleClass('sidebar-compact');
        });

        //Check for Dropdown
        checkForDD($('.widget .list-links li'));

        $('.widget').on('click', '.dd-trigger', function (event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            $(this).parent().toggleClass('isOpen');
            // Find first <ul> and display it
            $(this).parent().find('ul').toggleClass('visible');
        });

        //Make sortable
        //     $('.list-sortable').nestedSortable({
        //  placeholder: 'placeholder',
        //  forcePlaceholderSize: true,
        //  handle: '> div',
        //  helper: 'clone',
        //  items: 'li',
        //  opacity: .6,
        //  revert: 250,
        //  tabSize: 25,
        //  tolerance: 'pointer',
        //  toleranceElement: '> div',
        //  change: function(event, ui) {
        //      var $target = $(event.target).parent();
        //      var $sender = $(ui.sender).parent();

        //      $('.widget .list-sortable li').each(function() {
        //          var $li = $(this);

        //          if ( $li.find('> ul > li').length ) {
        //              $li.addClass('has-dd').addClass('isOpen').find('> ul').addClass('visible');

        //              if ( !$li.find('> .dd-trigger').length ) {
        //                  $li.prepend('<a class="dd-trigger"><i class="fa fa-angle-right"></i></a>');
        //              };
        //          } else {
        //              $li.removeClass('has-dd');
        //              $li.find('.dd-trigger').remove();
        //              $li.find('> ul').remove();
        //          }
        //      });
        //  }
        // }).disableSelection();

        // Check if <img> tags should be made backgrounds
        if ($('.fix-bg').length) {
            fixBG();
        }

        // Toggle buttons
        $('.toggle').on('click', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            var $toggle = $(this);
            var $target = $toggle.data('target') ? $($toggle.data('target')) : $toggle.data('next') !== undefined ? $toggle.next() : $($toggle.attr('href'));
            var toggleClass = $toggle.data('class') ? $toggle.data('class') : 'active';

            $toggle
                .add($target)
                .toggleClass(toggleClass);
        });
    });
})(jQuery, window, document);

$(document.body).on('click touchstart', '.delComment', function () {
    var input = $(this);
    var delUrl = input.attr("delurl");
    var cont = true;
    $('.main').prepend('<div class="message message-error"><p>Are you sure you want to delete this comment?</p><div class="action-wrapper"><a href="#0" class="confirm-btn">Delete</a><a href="#0" class="link-close">Cancel</a></div></div>');
    $('.message.message-error').show();

    $('.message.message-error .confirm-btn').off().on('click', function (event) {
        if (cont == true) {
            $.ajax({
                url: delUrl,
                type: "DELETE",
                dataType: "json",
                success: function (resp) {
                    console.log(resp);
                    //var numId = "'[link-id=\"" + resp.id + "\"]'";
                    //input.parent().fadeOut();
                    //$(numId).text(resp.text);
                    input.closest('.comment').slideUp();
                    $('.content-comments-head h4').text(resp.text.slice(0, 1) + " COMMENTS FOR THIS TOPIC");

                },
                error: function (resp) {
                    alert("Error Deleting Comment");
                }
            });
        }
        ;
        $('.message.message-error').fadeOut();
    });

    $('.message.message-error .link-close').off().on('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        $('.message.message-error').fadeOut().remove();
    });

});

{
    $(function () {

        $(".search-field-main:first").autocomplete({
            source: getSuggestionsDl,
            appendTo: ".search, .search-compact",
            autoFocus: false,
            minLength: 2,
            select: function (event, ui) {
                // Takes you to the suggested topic title selected
                //window.location = ui.item.url;
                // Takes you to the search results page with the topic title selected
                //$(".search-field:first").val(ui.item.value);
                //$(".search-field:first").closest("form").submit();
            }

        }).data("ui-autocomplete")._renderItem = function (ul, item) {
            //     item.label = item.label.replace(new RegExp("(?![^&;]+;)(?!<[^<>]*)(" + $.ui.autocomplete.escapeRegex(this.term) + ")(?![^<>]*>)(?![^&;]+;)", "gi"), "$1");
            /*-----------------For adding labels tag in suggestions-------------------*\
            \*------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
            return $("<li>")
                .data("ui-autocomplete-item", item)
                .append("<span>" + item.label + "</span>")
                //.append( "<span>" + item.label + "<span class='verT'> ("+item.labels[0]+")</span>" + "</span>" )
                .appendTo(ul);

        }
    });

    function getSuggestionsDl(request, response) {
        var params = $("input:checked[name='labels']").serializeArray();
        var query = { name: "q", value: request.term };
        params.push(query);

        if ($('#pubfield').length) { // If search is limited to a publication limit the suggestions returned by the publication
            var bundle = { name: "bundle", value: $('#pubfield').val() };
            params.push(bundle);
        }
        var params1 = $.param(params);
        $.ajax({
            dataType: "json",
            url: "https://learn-be.jamf.com/search/complete",
            data: params1,
            success: function (data) {
                //console.log(data.suggestions);
                response(data.suggestions);

            }
        });
    };
}

$('.inputfile').change(function () {
    var filename = $('.inputfile').val().split('\\').pop();
    if ($(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').length) {
        if (filename != '') {
            $(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').find('span:first-child').html(filename);
            $(this).parent().addClass('hidden');
        } else {
            $(this).parent().siblings('.inputfile-name').remove();
        }
    }
    else {
        $(this).parent().addClass('hidden');
        $(this).parent().after("<div class='inputfile-name'><span class='title'>FILE</span><div class='file'><div><span class='material-icons-outlined file-icon'>insert_drive_file</span><span>" + filename + "</span></div><span class='material-icons-outlined close-inputfile'>cancel</span></div></div");
        $('.close-inputfile').on('click', function (event) {
            $(this).parent().parent().siblings('.required').find('input').val('');
            $(this).parent().parent().siblings('.required').removeClass('hidden');
            $(this).parent().parent().remove();
            $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', true);
        });
    }
    if ($('.inputfile-name').length == 0 || ($('.inputfile-name').length && $('.inputfile-name')[0].innerHTML == "")) {
        $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', true);
    } else {
        $('.form-actions .btn-submit[value="Upload"]').attr('disabled', false);
    }
});

var zdocs = zdocs || {};
zdocs.queryString = function (queryStringAsString) {
    var qs = queryStringAsString || window.location.search.substring(1)
    var params = {}, queries, temp, i, l;
    queries = qs.split("&");
    for (i = 0, l = queries.length; i < l; i++) {
        temp = queries[i].split('=');
        params[temp[0]] = temp[1];
    }
    return params;
};

var searchLocations = [
    /\/bundle\/[^\/]+?\/page\/.+/,
    /\/bundle$/,
    /\/search$/,
    /\/admin\/definecontrole$/,
    /\/admin\/contentgroup\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/admin\/managebundles$/,
    /\/admin\/reviewertasks$/,
    /\/admin\/template$/,
    /\/admin\/template\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/admin\/watermark$/,
    /\/admin\/watermark\/[^\/]+$/,
    /\/mydocs$/,
    /\/managewatches\/[^\/]+$/
];

$(document).ready(function () {
    var pathname = document.location.pathname;
    var isSearchNeeded = false;
    for (let i = 0; i < searchLocations.length; i++)
        if (pathname.match(searchLocations[i]) !== null) {
            isSearchNeeded = true;
            break;
        }
    if (isSearchNeeded)
        $.ajax({
            url: '/api/search',
            type: "GET",
            dataType: "json",
            success: function (resp) {
                if (resp.relevant_labels) {
                    $('.widget-toc ul.list-links:first li').each(function () {
                        if (($(this).find($('.relevantFacet')).length > 0) || $(this).hasClass('relevantFacet')) {
                            $(this).removeClass('hidden-facet');
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    $('.hidden-facet').removeClass('hidden-facet');
                }
            },
            error: function () {
                $('.hidden-facet').removeClass('hidden-facet');
            }
        });
});

function checkFileUrl(url) {
  return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
    fetch(url).then(
      function(response) {
        if (response.ok) {
          return resolve();
        }
        reject();
      },
      reject
    );
  });
}

$(document).ready(function () {

    //one page on non-search page
