    }

    // ClusterConfig
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/clusterconfig") >= 0) {
        $('.SearchConfig ul').collapse('show');
        $(".SearchConfig ul li:last-child").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // LangFile
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/langfile") >= 0) {
        $(".LangFile").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // Reindex
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/reindex") >= 0) {
        $(".RedoIndex").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // SubjectSchemeLocalFiles
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/localsubjectscheme") >= 0) {
        $(".SubjectSchemeLocalFiles").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // CategoriesLocalFiles
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/localcategories") >= 0) {
        $(".CategoriesLocalFiles").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ReviewerTasks
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/reviewertasks") >= 0) {
        $(".ReviewerTasks").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ListTemplates
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/listtemplates") >= 0 || window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/template") >= 0) {
        $(".ListTemplates").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // myhowtos
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/myhowtos") >= 0) {
        $(".MyHowtos").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // ArticleAdmin
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/admin/articleadmin") >= 0) {
        $(".ArticleAdmin").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // SearchDocuments
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/search") >= 0) {
        $(".SearchDocuments").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // Reportings
    if (window.location.href.indexOf("/reportings") >= 0) {
        $(".Reportings").addClass('activeNav');
    }

    // afmin-nav filter functionality
    $('#admin-nav-search').on('input', function (event) {
        updateNavLinks(event);
    });

    function updateNavLinks(event) {
        let allLinks = $('.admin-nav a');
        let q = event.target.value.toLowerCase();
        for (var index = 0; index < allLinks.length; ++index) {
            let linkElement = $(allLinks[index]);
            if(linkElement.find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)
                && linkElement.is('[data-target]')) {
                    let amountOfChildrenLinks = $(allLinks[index]).siblings('ul').children().length;
                    for(var j = 1; j <= amountOfChildrenLinks; ++j) {
                        $(allLinks[index + j]).parent().show();
                    }
                index += amountOfChildrenLinks;
            } else if (linkElement.find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)) {
                $(allLinks[index]).parent().show()
            } else if ($(allLinks[index]).is('[data-target]')) {
                let b = $(allLinks[index]).siblings('ul');
                let childVisible = false;
                let childrenLinks = b.children();
                childrenLinks.map(function(index) {
                    if (!childVisible) {
                        childVisible = $(childrenLinks[index]).find('h5').text().toLowerCase().includes(q)
                    }
                })
                childVisible ? $(allLinks[index]).parent().show() : $(allLinks[index]).parent().hide()
            } else {
                $(allLinks[index]).parent().hide()
            }
        };

        $('.nav-section').each(function () {
            if ($(this).find('.category-content:visible').length === 0) {
                $(this).find('.admin-title').hide();
            }
            else {
                $(this).find('.admin-title').show();
            }
        })

        let areAllInvisible = true;
        allLinks.map(function(index) {
            $(allLinks[index]).is(":visible") ? areAllInvisible = false : null;
        });

        if (areAllInvisible) {
            $('#no-results .admin-title').removeClass('hidden');
            $('#no-results .admin-title').show()
        }
        else {
            $('#no-results .admin-title').hide();
        }
    };
});

                'code',
                'fontBackgroundColor',
                'fontColor',
                'fontSize',
                'fontFamily'
            ],
        },
        language: 'en',
        image: {

                'imageTextAlternative',

                'imageStyle:side',
                'imageStyle:alignLeft',
                'imageStyle:alignRight',
                '|',

            ],

                types: ['jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'bmp', 'svg+xml']
            },
            styles: [
                'full',
                'alignLeft',
                'alignRight'
            ]
        },
        table: {
            contentToolbar: [
                'tableColumn',
                'tableRow',
                'mergeTableCells',
                'tableProperties',
                'tableCellProperties'
            ]
        },
        simpleUpload: {
            uploadUrl: uploadUrl || ''
        },
        licenseKey: 'LfYSrcoox/FcsHUwiONc/KjCrOJljNEN0SOCtuL8XP9sCXeU8Fdkav6GpDsCGezZrF4o071h9XmZfA==',
    };

    ClassicEditor
        .create(document.querySelector(targetId),
            editor_configuration
        ).then(function(newEditor) {
            editor = newEditor;
        })

    $('#clearManualDigest').on('click', function (event) {
        editor.setData('');
        $("#datepicker").val('')
    });

    $('#clearTestDigest').on('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        editor.setData('');
        $("#datepicker1").val('')
    });
}

function jobDeleteSession(url) {
  $('#pdfPDFWait').hide();
  return $.ajax({
    url:      url,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'GET',
  }).done(function (data) {
    console.log("Delete session: " + data);
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    console.log("Delete session error: " + response.status + " " + textStatus);
  });
}

function notifyByEmail(url) {
  $('#pdfPDFWait').hide();
  return $.ajax({
    url:      url,
    dataType: 'json',
    type:     'POST',
  }).done(function (data) {
    console.log("Delete session: " + data);
  }).fail(function (response, textStatus, errorThrown) {
    console.log("Delete session error: " + response.status + " " + textStatus);
  });
}
